name: Mo Brooks
subject: We’re being outraised 3-to-1...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Let me cut to the chase. My Never-Trumper, Open Borders, RINO-backed opponent has been on a fundraising tear these last few weeks.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=1&v=18)
---

| Peter, **Let me cut to the chase.** My Never-Trumper, Open Borders, RINO-backed opponent has been on a fundraising tear these last few weeks. [**According to recent reports, she’s outraising us 3-to-1!**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlz1wL1QPf6NF9BAVY5ElJg5Ik61N43meGo6arF-UAPSw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=2&v=18 "Help us bridge the gap today!") To put these numbers into perspective, her team is claiming to have raised roughly * **$75,000 PER DAY*** in their first few weeks on the campaign trail for a whopping $2.2 MILLION -- _**that’s equivalent to more than 3x what we’ve been able to raise in the entire 2nd Quarter of 2021!**_ To put it bluntly, this is not a good sign. Let me be clear though, as long as **MAGA Nation** has my back, we WILL overcome any obstacles thrown at us, no matter how well-funded they are! Can you help us bridge the fundraising gap between our Trump-endorsed, conservative campaign, and my opponent, the professional lobbyist, hand-picked and supported by the D.C. Establishment? [**Chip in $5, $10, $25, or $100 today, to help us bounce back STRONG from these latest fundraising reports!**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlz1wL1QPf6NF9BAVY5ElJg5Ik61N43meGo6arF-UAPSw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=3&v=18 "Chip in today!") With folks like YOU, President Trump, Senator Rand Paul (R-KY), Congressman Barry Moore (R-AL), Mark Levin, Club for Growth, the National Association of Gun Rights by my side, I know this is OUR race to win. _**But we simply CANNOT neglect her fundraising advantage.**_ You see, I don’t have a family fortune to fund my campaign, unlike some of my opponents. I don’t have ties to Liberal Elites or Shady Special Interest Groups that will cut me a check at a moment’s notice. [**I’m dependent upon the tens of thousands of grassroots conservatives just like you chipping in $10, $20, or whatever they can, when they can, to help put America First again.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlz1wL1QPf6NF9BAVY5ElJg5Ik61N43meGo6arF-UAPSw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=4&v=18 "Can you chip in today?") _**Can you help us fight back?**_ [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlz1wL1QPf6NF9BAVY5ElJg5Ik61N43meGo6arF-UAPSw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=5&v=18 "Donate today!") For Alabama, Mo Brooks [**P.S. -- Here’s some quick math to break down my opponent’s INSANE fundraising numbers: $75,000 PER DAY is equivalent to more than $50 PER MINUTE! Any amount you could chip in to help us bridge this divide would go a long way >>**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rlz1wL1QPf6NF9BAVY5ElJg5Ik61N43meGo6arF-UAPSw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=6&v=18 "Help us bridge the divide!")
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=opppo_fundraising&n=7&v=18).
---
**SEND A PROVEN CONSERVATIVE LEADER TO THE SENATE**
Mo Brooks for Senate Committee
P.O. Box 4678 Huntsville, AL 35815
PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE

name: Maddy, Trump Alerts (via House GOP)
subject: Where were you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please let us know that you're okay

Peter, Trump gave an OUTSTANDING SPEECH at CPAC yesterday! He knocked it out of the park... per usual.

It's always fantastic to see the greatest President taking the stage. **But it didn 't help that you IGNORED our repeated requests to stand alongside Donald Trump and House Conservatives. **

_Peter, we're not mad...just disappointed. We really thought that you would want to give back to the leader who has given so much to you ..._

[**Here 's one final chance. If you still care about this country, President Trump, and House Conservatives, please chip in whatever you can in the next hour so Trump knows you still care.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923789:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923789:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

[**CHIP IN ASAP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923789:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

Peter, this is serious. Leadership has asked us to check in on you several times, and you still haven't responded to us. [**Please let us know that you 're okay>>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923789:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

This country won't get any better unless Patriots like you act. And it's clear: [**there isn 't a better time to stand up and do your part than right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923789:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

Thank you,

House Conservatives

[**P.S. Trump has teased that he may run for President again if we take back the House. If that sounds exciting to you, please chip in a donation in the next hour to show Trump you 're one of his Top Patriots!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923789:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57923790:6MEPTPlnN:m:1:3253819041:76AC5D09D6DB18405DFC9309122F9AAA:r)

name: Kelli Ward
subject: America’s Audit is inspiring other states!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Arizona
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924010:Ji61kPlNs:m:1:3253819041:F718B5771DF8E8AD3BD0726A82A635EF:r)
---
| | Peter,
This is AZGOP Chairwoman, Dr. Kelli Ward. The full forensic audit of the Maricopa County 2020 General Election - aka, America's Audit - has now begun to inspire others. Legislators in Pennsylvania are grabbing the baton by calling for a forensic audit in their state as well. They even heaped praise for our efforts here in Arizona, saying that we **" really set the standards on a forensic analysis"** **-_everyone knows that our investigation here was thorough, complete, groundbreaking, and a monumental endeavor for_**** _Election Integrity!_** But that's also why the panicked Democrats and their media allies have been on a mission to try to discredit the effort - [_stand with us and show them we won 't back down!_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924010:Ji61kPlNs:m:1:3253819041:F718B5771DF8E8AD3BD0726A82A635EF:r)
---
| [SUPPORT AMERICA'S AUDIT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924010:Ji61kPlNs:m:1:3253819041:F718B5771DF8E8AD3BD0726A82A635EF:r "SUPPORT AMERICA’S AUDIT")
---
| The support of grassroots patriots has pushed America's Audit along to this point, and the hand count phase has now wrapped up. **And I, just like all of you,**_**anxiously await the full report on the 2020 Election!**_ Yet even before it's been completed, our Audit has already started to bear great results with other states jumping aboard. That's why the AZGOP will _**_ALWAYS_** _take a stand for Election Integrity and voter confidence - **and we will always be grateful for your continued support as we protect the bedrock of our republic _together!_**
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924010:Ji61kPlNs:m:1:3253819041:F718B5771DF8E8AD3BD0726A82A635EF:r "JOIN THE FIGHT FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY!")
---
| Here at the Republican Party of Arizona, it's always America First. Thank you for your continued support!
_Dr. Kelli Ward_ _Chairwoman_ _Republican Party of Arizona_

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: quid-pro Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter --

For four straight years, the Democrats and
the Fake News Media tried to impeach and remove President Trump
from office.
They put our country through hell alleging
"Russian collusion" without a shred of evidence! Nancy Pelosi's
House even voted to impeach Trump not once - but TWICE!
And when evidence came to light showing that
Joe Biden did everything the Democrats and the Fake News claimed
President Trump did, nothing happened.
Enough is enough. I'm tired of the Swampy
double standard!
Quid pro-Joe Biden abused his power as Vice
President. Americans will not tolerate this. I will NOT tolerate
it.
That's why I filed Articles of Impeachment on
Joe Biden.
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN -
EMERGENCY DONATE $25

Will you chip in $25 to support my
Impeachment Articles?
The Biden Crime Family must be held
accountable.
Caving to China after they unleashed a virus
on America. . .
Hunter Biden's shady dealings. . .
The "Big Man" taking his cut. . .
Quid Pro Joe is abusing his power as
President just like he did as Vice President.
Help me hold the Biden Crime Family
accountable by chipping in $25 right away.
I'll keep you updated.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Nikki Fried
subject: From the Panhandle to Key West
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

In October 2020, Donald Trump held a rally in The Villages, a Florida community with close to 80,000 residents age 55 or older. A few weeks later, he won close to 70% of the vote in The Villages.

On Saturday, I travelled there to speak to a packed crowd of Democrats and Independents about saving our Democracy and stopping Ron DeSantis. The reception was overwhelmingly positive.

I won’t send you an email about every campaign stop, but this is different. To defeat Ron DeSantis and flip our state blue, we need to connect with people in every corner of our state—not just the cities and towns with the most Democrats.

We did this in 2018, when I became the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. We’re going to keep doing it all the way through November 2022. And then we’re going to have a Governor who serves all Floridians.

I need your help to get this done. To win this race, we need a massive operation that reaches everyone from the Panhandle to Key West. If you’re ready to help build that movement, click here to donate now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/enf-big-movement]

The conventional wisdom from political insiders might say I shouldn’t be campaigning in the same place Trump held a huge rally last year.

But we’ll need more than conventional wisdom to stop Ron DeSantis next year. We’ll need to try something new.

That’s exactly what we’re doing in this campaign. If you’re with us, click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/enf-big-movement]

Thanks,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: A Green New Deal, now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

This past week, as Hurricane Elsa hit New York City, a Twitter user posted a clip of an individual wading through murky, waist-high water to get to the train at 157th Street. The clip went viral, and for good reason. Here’s a picture, in case you missed it:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32328181/295411113/-1167945813?refcode2=1f02378b-ebe3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210713-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjAyMzc4Yi1lYmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjhn4sCL5vNE7-y4kHHpWuUXezrDaweCqkI_wwE2Y9g=)
**Let’s be very clear: this flooding is happening because of decades of inaction from government leaders on climate change, and no “bipartisan infrastructure bill” is going to change that.**
And the dam is breaking, literally and figuratively. In just the past few weeks, we’ve seen:
* The Gulf of Mexico literally on fire
* Severe droughts and wildfires in California
* Portland streetcar service suspended because of dangerous and unprecedented high temperatures

**Without a Green New Deal, this will only get worse.** If we don’t take immediate action on climate change, we’re looking at a future where major coastal cities are completely uninhabitable and millions around the world are forced from their homes. Truthfully, all our lives are on the line.
You might ask why Republicans and conservatives in my own party aren’t working around the clock to pass comprehensive climate change legislation. The truth is that many of their campaigns are bankrolled by fossil fuel corporations and other bad actors who have a vested interest in holding back progress.
These members are abandoning their duty to their constituents, period. I’m doing everything I can to take them to task so we can pass a Green New Deal - but I won’t be able to do that without your support. So I’m asking:
[**Can you make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to support me as I work to pass the Green New Deal and fight the climate crisis? The past few weeks have underscored what we already know: we can’t wait a minute longer to pass comprehensive climate change legislation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32328182/295411114/-1167945813?refcode2=1f02378b-ebe3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210713-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjAyMzc4Yi1lYmUzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjhn4sCL5vNE7-y4kHHpWuUXezrDaweCqkI_wwE2Y9g=)
Passing a Green New Deal will give us the opportunity to create millions of new jobs and save our communities from further devastation.
But we’re up against oil and fossil fuel executives and climate change deniers at every level of government who want to keep living in denial and pretending that our lives aren’t at stake. That’s why I need you by my side as I fight to pass a Green New Deal.
Thank you, as always, for your support.
\- Mondaire

clean_body: This past week, as Hurricane Elsa hit New York City, a Twitter user posted a clip of an individual wading through murky, waist-high water to get to the train at 157th Street. The clip went viral, and for good reason. Here’s a picture, in case you missed it: = Let’s be very clear: this flooding is happening because of decades of inaction from government leaders on climate change, and no “bipartisan infrastructure bill” is going to change that. And the dam is breaking, literally and figuratively. In just the past few weeks, we’ve seen: The Gulf of Mexico literally on fire Severe droughts and wildfires in California Portland streetcar service suspended because of dangerous and unprecedented high temperatures Without a Green New Deal, this will only get worse. If we don’t take immediate action on climate change, we’re looking at a future where major coastal cities are completely uninhabitable and millions around the world are forced from their homes. Truthfully, all our lives are on the line. You might ask why Republicans and conservatives in my own party aren’t working around the clock to pass comprehensive climate change legislation. The truth is that many of their campaigns are bankrolled by fossil fuel corporations and other bad actors who have a vested interest in holding back progress. These members are abandoning their duty to their constituents, period. I’m doing everything I can to take them to task so we can pass a Green New Deal - but I won’t be able to do that without your support. So I’m asking: = Passing a Green New Deal will give us the opportunity to create millions of new jobs and save our communities from further devastation. But we’re up against oil and fossil fuel executives and climate change deniers at every level of government who want to keep living in denial and pretending that our lives aren’t at stake. That’s why I need you by my side as I fight to pass a Green New Deal. Thank you, as always, for your support. \- Mondaire = | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for week of July 12th: CRT/school training webinars & toolkits
body:
| |
---
About a week ago, we launched our new training webinars, and got some great feedback. We covered both of our new how-to guides – fighting Critical Race Theory and attending school board meetings – and are planning many more, so stay tuned.

See below for additional action items, and thank you for all you do!

Action items for this week include:
* **Watch recordings of our training webinars & download the toolkits**
* **Sign up to attend an August local government meeting**
* **Reminders and other sign up forms**

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Watch recordings of training webinars
**
If you haven’t yet, go ahead and [sign up and commit to attend the July school board meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0MDUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=MFe2YIgqfc61olUpi0o3dw) in your school district. Then, please take some time this week to watch recordings of the three webinars we recently held. After you watch them, please share them with others.
* [Intro to Attend a School Board Meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZWdpc3Rlci8xMy8wNHc4eWMzP21pZD00NDA1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=XsolRqeuNX_7CV9ZwZmYOA)
* [Next Steps to Attend School Board Meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZWdpc3Rlci8yNi83OHpueWk3bT9taWQ9NDQwNTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=VWcSShiOLIYawkxkAX7noA)
* [Critical Race Theory Toolkit Intro - Focus for Schools](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZWdpc3Rlci8yNy80OXc2eXN4Nz9taWQ9NDQwNTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1F7u_YG8ma1OmXLtKFjU8A)

**Links to the toolkits being discussed in the webinars:**
[Attend a School Board Meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vdG9vbGtpdHMvQXR0ZW5kX1NjaG9vbF9Cb2FyZF9NZWV0aW5nX0hvd19Ub19HdWlkZS5wZGY_bWlkPTQ0MDUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=eq-_QNyogp6QmN4HF44RzQ) (Note: this toolkit has a lot more information that is important to know than just about attending a school board meeting, so we encourage you to look at it, even if you are not attending a meeting.)

[United We Stand: Combatting Critical Race Theory](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vdG9vbGtpdHMvVW5pdGVkX1dlX1N0YW5kX0hvd19Ub19HdWlkZS5wZGY_bWlkPTQ0MDUyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=U0OMlCy9ScqtP_u9ASP_Gw) (Simply scroll down to the red box that says, “How-to Guide,” and enter your email address in the space next to the red box.)
Over the weekend, the Texas legislature advanced two election security bills out of committee, in both the House and Senate, aimed at making it easier to vote and harder to cheat.

While radical Democrats continue to fight relentlessly against this common-sense legislation, they lost in the committee vote and are expected to lose in the final vote.

Radical Democrats are so upset about Texas taking steps to ensure election integrity that they are considering leaving the state to block passage. Yes, you read that correctly.

Their actions are absurd and go directly against the will of the people of Texas. We support Texas in their fight to pass common-sense election security laws.
|
---
**Sign up to attend an August local government meeting**
[**Sign up and commit to attend a local government meeting in August.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDA1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=i_WyEZi0Oziqo7UToYs6RA)**** This could be your city or county governmental body, or if you weren’t able to attend the July school board meeting (or they didn’t have one), you could attend a school board meeting in August.

**If we expect to make any positive changes in our country, we have to get involved locally, and the first step is attending the publicly-held meetings.** Please make this a priority and attend! The webinars we linked above will help you make your plan. And, if you don’t want to speak at the meeting the first time you go, you don’t have to. For now, just go!
[LET US KNOW YOU’LL BE ATTENDING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDA1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jdeXjbfeXNhki7NYM6U9_Q)
|
---
In a turn of events that should shock no one, radical Democrats and the teacher’s unions are now admitting Critical Race Theory (CRT) is being taught in American public schools.

First they said no one was teaching critical race theory in schools. Now they are teaching it, but only because it’s history.

**[The Federalist has the story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDIxLzA3LzEyL2xlZnRpc3RzLXNoaWZ0aW5nLXRoZS1zdG9yeS1vbi1jcml0aWNhbC1yYWNlLXRoZW9yeS1lZHVjYXRpb24tZXhwb3Nlcy10aGVpci1oeXBvY3Jpc3kvP21pZD00NDA1MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tGc-ag6ct-bH4heUZ7WDJg)**
|
---
**Repeal the mask mandate on airplanes**
On July 8, Sen. Rand Paul [tweeted](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTk0LTJiMjBiNzAyZWVmNTRmZmQ4MjMwZWUxOGJmZmYyNWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9SYW5kUGF1bC9zdGF0dXMvMTQxMzE1MjY2MDE5MTAxNDkxOT9taWQ9NDQwNTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JiAJfp9saJM8Q0nRlSsiqQ), “When the Senate returns to session, I will be introducing an immediate repeal of the mask mandate on planes. Enough! Time to stop this farce and let people travel in peace!”

**ICYMI: "Jesse Jensen to take on Kim Schrier for 8th Congressional District"** Did you hear this huge race update, Peter?

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Billionaires are going to space while our kids go to underfunded schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We can’t continue to let billionaires greedily exploit our tax system.
#

Folks, do you want to know what makes me mad?
The fact that billionaires like Jeff Bezos are going to space while our kids are going to underfunded public schools.
It’s absolutely ridiculous that billionaires use every loophole they can to evade paying taxes while working-class families foot the bill.
**I think it’s about time we change that. That’s why I’m fighting for a wealth tax that will finally make the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share.**
[Friend, if you’re with me, will you chip in $3 to help me take this fight to the Senate? We need more senators who will demand bold, progressive action to end wealth inequality.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32331018/295424328/-353695395?refcode2=19791a68-f3e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210712-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc5MWE2OC1mM2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X14VvHe68tSACg7ORJRC8FVcHgYoa_F8Q3Q5jWJc0cM=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32331025/295424337/-353695395?refcode2=19791a68-f3e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210712-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc5MWE2OC1mM2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X14VvHe68tSACg7ORJRC8FVcHgYoa_F8Q3Q5jWJc0cM=)**
The average American household pays about 14% in income taxes each year.
But because billionaires like Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk hire expensive lobbyists in D.C. and exploit every tax loophole they can find, they pay as little as 3.2% or less in taxes.
Meanwhile, here in Philadelphia, some districts literally have to cancel school on hot summer days because they do not have air conditioning.
**I think we can all agree that’s an absolute damn shame.**
We can’t continue to let billionaires greedily exploit our tax system while our children attend crumbling, underfunded schools.
That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me, friend. It’s past time we had a Senate that will stand up to billionaires and make them pay their fair share.
[Could you pitch in $3 to fuel our fight to level the playing field? We’re done letting ultra-wealthy billionaires skirt the rules at the expense of working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32331031/295424343/-353695395?refcode2=19791a68-f3e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210712-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc5MWE2OC1mM2UzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X14VvHe68tSACg7ORJRC8FVcHgYoa_F8Q3Q5jWJc0cM=)
Thanks for your support,
Malcolm

name: PACT
subject: WOW: Nation’s largest teachers union endorses Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
"They're not trying to educate; they're trying to indoctrinate." \- Ron DeSantis

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924658:6PtxuPlNK:m:1:3253819041:E26176467E61E75BA534C29A27B0CBBB:r)
---
Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924658:6PtxuPlNK:m:1:3253819041:E26176467E61E75BA534C29A27B0CBBB:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924658:6PtxuPlNK:m:1:3253819041:E26176467E61E75BA534C29A27B0CBBB:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924658:6PtxuPlNK:m:1:3253819041:E26176467E61E75BA534C29A27B0CBBB:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us DEFEAT Critical Race Theory> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57924658:6PtxuPlNK:m:1:3253819041:E26176467E61E75BA534C29A27B0CBBB:r)**

Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time. The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America. LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS: Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors." The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them. This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated. But we need your help, Peter. As we like to say, " We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!" We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU. Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools? | | "###" | "###" | "###" | "###" | "###" | "###" Thank you for your support. It really does mean the world to us. name: Culp for Congress
subject: Now they're saying vaccine booster?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BzuPea&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECjM9uY&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/45c11ac4-ee21-4553-86a1-d140b4f1c6ff.png]

Where does this stop?

Pfizer is planning on asking the FDA to authorize booster dose of COVID vaccine as talks of the Delta variant loom. Will the booster dose of the COVID vaccine be politicized and used as a tool to scare and pressure the public into allowing the government to continue to make choices for you?

But Loren, the government wouldn't do that...would they?

Biden's Health and Human Services Secretary Becerra stated in an interview with CNN, “it is absolutely the government’s business”to know whether you’ve been vaccinated. What happened to our constitutional rights? What happened to our HIPPA rights? Under Biden, civil servants shred the very documents they swore an oath to protect.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/830008fa-d11a-4288-b587-ff954c744932.jpg]

We don't want the feds on our property!

We have a right to our medical privacy, we have a right to be in our own yard and not have someone from the federal government stop by and violate the 4th amendment. As Americans, we do not tolerate tyranny.

I know you're angry, I am too.

Everyday Americans matter; you matter. It's time we stop this destruction of our nation. Stand with me, get involved, run for office, go to the school board meetings, stand with candidates that will have your back. Together we can "protect and defend" this nation we love.

It's time to stand up for America!

Loren

clean_body: I wish I had better news. | Peter, I’m sorry to reach out today with such stressful news, but I have to be honest with you about where things stand in our fight to Keep North Carolina Red. I just got an update from my finance team, and it’s not good: 1. Campaign Finance Reports are leaking out after last month’s End-Of-Quarter Deadline, and we now know that 2. Our own fundraising is behind pace where we need to be to stay competitive. If we don’t rally quickly We need Grassroots Republican support if we’re going to close the gap and catch up to the Democrats. That’s why I’m going to be personally reviewing every donation that comes in over the next 24 hours. | | With our chance to reclaim the Republican Senate Majority on the line, we can’t afford to take a chance. And, like in 2020, North Carolina is an absolute must-win state. We cannot afford to lose. Remember, I’m personally going to be reviewing every donation that comes in over the next 24 hours to monitor our progress towards this goal. I hope I’ll see your name on that list. Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Team Pelosi
subject: Join us for a call tonight at 8pm ET / 5pm PT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends:
Already, over 330 million vaccines are in people’s arms, more than 160 million checks are in their pockets and millions more are getting back to work. In fact, starting July 15th, 40 million families – approximately 90 percent of children living in America – will begin receiving up to $300 in monthly payments.

This tremendous accomplishment was secured thanks to your hard work For The People. Because of you, we overcame the former Administration’s deadly and disastrous COVID delays. Working together, we won the election and brought life-saving and life-changing relief. Our work will continue.

To learn more about how the Child Tax Credit impacts families in America and to hear from a stellar group of champions fighting to Build Back Better for people across our country, join us tonight at 8pm ET / 5pm PT for a groups call. Register here! myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/ALYT73F8UIOC05MR

Everything that we do is for the children – for their future, their aspirations, and their hopes.

Thank you for joining us in the fight.

Onward, Team Pelosi

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: My fight to expand access to home ownership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
It’s past time we help people not only weather the storm but prosper and build generational wealth for their families. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux59_KAOIXlgdMwznbVJcSHnJMuYDEqFOWDTfillyDS_DfYUKdzcVgO-v1niiYBw49qZqC8JGulBSTZkRCTLB9huLqBXEBYp0ywQ_k6FIF--ZqsggaNYOb9OVjNYJnwefoPzeHYW0wYJqfT7rpkP1n4-NRSHoVWv4inbBzkbD4N4_u6yg9pP-QTTV1-KYHH6vQuj0u7DhBmi8uRWZhhdbbl4GONPQwZdbPiQSWtGxgxSYSDFZCycrM6Nd3AW1pZF2BHNISZc6jQyadSk2sdCsdD1BfspdWjuMAcqGtiMZixwq-b8hmzPul7rfJ0ShLxMTC_3TEj7yKr_YmWS-g_zqhzTkCmWu-dSApg2cREsmk1TFLfcyuwQfGH1ad1pf4qmlOMFqwztUJhMR_aQnaxdF0uo/3dk/lvgyfUlVRRedvEJJQmOpvg/h0/1Enk-JvBiMKfz2XZwHIO8ESSEu2D4kW-yHyY5HLiKPE)

| | Friend,

Northern Ohio’s economy has been hit hard by numerous challenges, including the one we’re still grappling with today -- the COVID-19 pandemic. Through it all, folks here have worked tirelessly to rebuild our communities and keep their families afloat. It’s past time we help people not only weather the storm but prosper and build generational wealth for their families.

**That is why I co-authored the Restoring Communities Left Behind Act. This key legislation aims to revitalize small towns and cities by securing $5 billion for local communities -- creating affordable housing opportunities for those who have been left out.**

So many families have struggled for too long to recover from the economic impacts caused by the housing crisis. The Restoring Communities Left Behind Act is a lifeline for those families and for communities such as Toledo, Lorain, Sandusky, Cleveland, and places in between. By improving housing accessibility and assisting current homeowners, we can create economic security and long-lasting stability.

**[Thank you for this opportunity to serve and to build support for this targeted program. We can secure critical support for working Americans who are impacted by decades of job loss, housing disinvestment, and racial inequity. clean_body: It’s past time we help people not only weather the storm but prosper and build generational wealth for their families. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, Northern Ohio’s economy has been hit hard by numerous challenges, including the one we’re still grappling with today -- the COVID-19 pandemic. Through it all, folks here have worked tirelessly to rebuild our communities and keep their families afloat. It’s past time we help people not only weather the storm but prosper and build generational wealth for their families. That is why I co-authored the Restoring Communities Left Behind Act. This key legislation aims to revitalize small towns and cities by securing $5 billion for local communities -- creating affordable housing opportunities for those who have been left out. So many families have struggled for too long to recover from the economic impacts caused by the housing crisis. The Restoring Communities Left Behind Act is a lifeline for those families and for communities such as Toledo, Lorain, Sandusky, Cleveland, and places in between. By improving housing accessibility and assisting current homeowners, we can create economic security and long-lasting stability. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your confidence and support, Marcy Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States | | | | Sent via . subject: Where were you, Peter?

body:
Please let us know that you're okay

Peter, Trump gave an OUTSTANDING SPEECH at CPAC! He knocked it out of the park... per usual.

It's always fantastic to see the greatest President taking the stage. **But it didn 't help that you IGNORED our repeated requests to stand alongside Donald Trump and House Conservatives. **

_Peter, we're not mad...just disappointed. We really thought that you would want to give back to the leader who has given so much to you ..._

[**Here 's one final chance. If you still care about this country, President Trump, and House Conservatives, please chip in whatever you can in the next hour so Trump knows you still care.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928027:JOB7VPlNK:m:1:3253819041:3D5E5C8FFB0C4301FC920036E9457C1A:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928027:JOB7VPlNK:m:1:3253819041:3D5E5C8FFB0C4301FC920036E9457C1A:r)

[**CHIP IN ASAP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928027:JOB7VPlNK:m:1:3253819041:3D5E5C8FFB0C4301FC920036E9457C1A:r)

Peter, this is serious. Leadership has asked us to check in on you several times, and you still haven't responded to us. [**Please let us know that you 're okay>>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928027:JOB7VPlNK:m:1:3253819041:3D5E5C8FFB0C4301FC920036E9457C1A:r)

This country won't get any better unless Patriots like you act. And it's clear: [**there isn 't a better time to stand up and do your part than right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928027:JOB7VPlNK:m:1:3253819041:3D5E5C8FFB0C4301FC920036E9457C1A:r)

Thank you,

House Conservatives

[**P.S. Trump has teased that he may run for President again if we take back the House. If that sounds exciting to you, please chip in a donation in the next hour to show Trump you 're one of his Top Patriots!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928027:JOB7VPlNK:m:1:3253819041:3D5E5C8FFB0C4301FC920036E9457C1A:r)

clean_body: \-- Message for Peter Willis -- | We’ll get right to the point, Peter. It may seem like the next election is a long way off, but the truth is that the Democrats are already building a HUGE FUNDRAISING ADVANTAGE. | | | | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Gwen Moore
subject: I see bad news a-rising
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
The Guttmacher Institute (a leading women's health policy research organization) released its annual mid-year state policy trends report on July 1st. The results are nothing short of terrifying.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/rzBzIn9eG9zVoRblx6nBIrC8F4JcRGaPK00jKaUDOSM=/1pdfka1fkuQGVNSHR1ndp4jYhjSBonhVXbl4pEoKadQ=?refcode=071321)
[_**I am proud of my 100% rating by NARAL and Planned Parenthood, but ratings don 't get the job done. I need your help to turn the tide. Will you help?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rzBzIn9eG9zVoRblx6nBIrC8F4JcRGaPK00jKaUDOSM=/1pdfka1fkuQGVNSHR1ndp4jYhjSBonhVXbl4pEoKadQ=?refcode=071321)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/rzBzIn9eG9zVoRblx6nBIrC8F4JcRGaPK00jKaUDOSM=/1pdfka1fkuQGVNSHR1ndp4jYhjSBonhVXbl4pEoKadQ=?refcode=071321)

| | |

| | In Trump’s latest endorsement of Glenn Youngkin, he called the 2020 election a “scam” and claimed that “vote counters” might steal the Virginia Governor’s election from Youngkin.

Derek, he’s not even trying to hide it. Donald Trump is trying to undermine Virginia’s elections to help his hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin.

Trump’s inflammatory rhetoric is dangerous and anti-democratic, and if Glenn Youngkin doesn’t condemn him, he has no business being a governor in Virginia or anywhere else in America.

**[Today, I’m calling on Youngkin to disavow Trump’s statement and to tell Virginia voters that our democracy is strong and our elections are fair. body:
Pence’s plan for New Hampshire | | |
---
**"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022."** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32339360/295454371/1018596853?refcode=e20210713_mwh_mm-pence&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjgwMzI1NC0wY2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgP9Mc6P0wC1X3Sr_dwgM5Id8N5sjXjeOUyGHtue100=)

Hi there,
Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me.
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. They just let me know that we still have $10,000 to go to hit our mid-month goal.
**[Having Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race is really bad news. Will you please rush $5 or more right now to help make up ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32339361/295454372/1018596853?refcode=e20210713_mwh_mm-pence&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjgwMzI1NC0wY2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgP9Mc6P0wC1X3Sr_dwgM5Id8N5sjXjeOUyGHtue100=)**
Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around.
We don’t need mega-donors like Republicans to win, but we do need people like you to give $5 or what you can right now -- before Thursday’s deadline -- to show our strength.
Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. **[Will you please donate $5 or more to protect our vulnerable Senate seat -- and Democrats’ fragile majority? clean_body: Pence’s plan for New Hampshire | | | "We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022." | | = Hi there, Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me. Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. They just let me know that we still have $10,000 to go to hit our mid-month goal. = Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around. We don’t need mega-donors like Republicans to win, but we do need people like you to give $5 or what you can right now -- before Thursday’s deadline -- to show our strength. Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Thank you for helping. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Giffords.org
subject: 40,000 lives could be saved by 10 senators
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
This year, 40,000 Americans will die of gun violence. And the thing is, 10 Americans could help stop it.
**Those 10 Americans sit in the U.S. Senate. They are the key votes that decide whether our country will finally require a background check for firearm purchases or continue to look the other way as massive loopholes in our gun laws allow people to buy them with no questions asked.**
Getting Congress to pass a background checks bill has been a top legislative priority for us. And right now, we’re closer than we have ever been to achieving that goal.
Getting Congress to pass a background checks bill has been a top legislative priority for us. And right now, we’re closer than we have ever been to achieving that goal.
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us urge the Senate to pass universal background checks? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210713-1-15&t=1&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=14&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=15&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=16&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=17&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=18&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=19&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**
---
****
The votes of these 10 senators will decide whether or not this lifesaving legislation becomes the law of the land. And we’re doing everything we can to get them to do the right thing because people’s lives are in their hands.
Four of these senators are retiring. So we need to convince them that their choice right now is to leave a legacy of courage, not a legacy of lethal indifference.
For the other six of these senators, the message is simple: _Protect your constituents or lose your job._
These senators know there will be political consequences if they side with Mitch McConnell and the gun lobby. In the last two elections, supporters like you have helped us defeat candidates who have put the gun lobby ahead of people’s lives.
So let’s keep up the pressure, together, and make sure these senators know we are watching and their actions will have consequences.
**Here’s that link one more time if you want to chip in to help save lives:[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Background-Checks-Now**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210713-1-15&t=20&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)
Thank you for being in this fight with us,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210713-1-15&t=21&refcode2=331_3935704_vUsvMq&akid=331%2E3935704%2EvUsvMq)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

This summer has been flying by — if you can believe it, we’re almost halfway through July. As Susan’s finance director, it’s my job to make sure she has all the resources she needs to stand up to the GOP and hold this seat in 2022. = | = Unlike her Republican opponent, Susan doesn’t have millions of dollars of personal wealth to spend on her own campaign, and she doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. She relies on grassroots donors like you, Peter — = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Daniel Roth Team Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. = | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. name: Alvin Williams (BAMPAC)
subject: They'll stop at nothing to destroy him...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Peter Willis, The Democrats have unleashed a vicious, **all-out assault** on Senator Tim Scott... "Uncle Tim" and "Token Uncle Tom" "You're the lowest piece of sh*t this country ever produced" "A traitor to the black community" ...and they won't stop until they've destroyed his reputation, his career, and his life like they've done to Dr. Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and so many other Black conservatives before him. [I'm hoping you'll Endorse Tim Scott for Senate this election and help him fight back against the Democrats' vicious attacks...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=1) **...but first let me explain why Democrats are so desperate to destroy Senator Tim Scott.** [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=2)As you may know, Senator Tim Scott recently delivered the official Republican rebuttal to Joe Biden's address to a Joint Session of Congress. In his speech, Senator Scott declared that "_America is not a racist country_ ," setting fire to the foundation of the radical Left's empire of racist lies. In response, Left-wing activists set out to prove him wrong by being shockingly racist themselves and... **...making "**Uncle Tim** " one of the top trending terms on Twitter for 12 full hours!** The news media responded to Tim's speech by ushering out their "blacktivist" shills to attack him, blast his speech, reassert that the Republican Party (and America as a whole) are **racist** , and pour even more gasoline on the fires of racial tension. _Evidently oblivious to their own hypocrisy_ , CNN contributors argued that Senator Scott can't claim America is not racist because he admitted in his speech that _liberals_ frequently call him "Uncle Tim" and the N-word... [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=3)...with one commentator, _as if to drive the point home_ , saying, "I would never call Scott an Uncle Tom. It's an insult to the character Uncle Tom." That's right. The mainstream media's response to Tim Scott's powerful and unifying message to the nation was basically: "You can't say America is not racist because liberals ARE racist. Here, let us show you, Uncle Tom!" **Sadly, being attacked, slandered, and ridiculed by liberals is nothing new for those of us who have the audacity to be Black __and__ Republican.** After all, the Democrats ruthlessly attack Black conservatives like Senator Scott, Dr. Ben Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community... ...because, unlike conservatives of other races, we can speak directly to the Black Community and **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies about "racist" conservatives the keep Blacks voting for Democrats. But due to his respectful, agreeable, and quiet nature, Senator Tim Scott has operated under the radar and out of the Democrats' crosshairs for much of his career in the U.S. Senate... **...but all of that changed last year in the wake of George Floyd's death and the subsequent protests, unrest, and riots.** You see, for the previous five years in the U.S. Senate, Tim Scott had been doing everything possible to convince Democrats to work together to pass meaningful, bipartisan Police Reform legislation. After all, who better to lead this effort than one of the only U.S. Senators with real life, personal experience with this issue? **But for five years, the Democrats REFUSED to even take up Tim's police reform bill, RAILROADED his efforts, and IGNORED his warnings that this would blow up in their faces.** However, now that police reform was front-and-center and had the overwhelming support of most Americans, he believed the Democrats would finally work together to craft and pass much-needed police reform legislation. But what Tim Scott, _being an honest & trusting person_, didn't realize at that time (and learned the hard way) was... **...working with Republicans, especially Black Republicans, to solve problems facing the Black Community is _never_ on the Democrats' agenda because it would undermine their BIG LIE that "**Republicans are racist.** "** So instead of taking this rare opportunity to work together to actually solve a big issue, the Democrats launched an all-out media blitz to **LIE** about the contents of the bill and to viciously **slander** Tim Scott for even trying... ...with Nancy Pelosi going so far as to say that Tim Scott's police reform bill was just Republicans "**trying to get away with the murder, actually, the murder of George Floyd.** " Despite Senator Scott adding _everything_ the Democrats wanted into his bill, offering 20+ amendments, giving rewrite authority, and more... **...the Democrats still**BLOCKED** this crucial police reform bill from even being brought to the Senate floor for debate.** | "He proposed legislation to fix blue state, Democrat-run cities' police departments. What'd the Democrats do? **They insulted him, and they blocked the bill**... because they don't want a solution... They want the issue." \- The late Rush Limbaugh
---
Immediately after Democrats blocked the bill, Senator Scott took to the floor of the Senate with the fiery resolve of a man on a mission...
...and he delivered an impassioned & powerful reprimand of the Democrats, calling them out for what he described as "**race politics at its worst** "...
"The actual problem is not what was being offered, it was who was offering it... They cannot allow [Republicans] to be seen as a party that reaches out to all communities in this nation."
"When Speaker Pelosi says one of the most heinous things I can imagine... She knows that she can say that because the Democrats have a monopoly on the black vote."
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=4)Senator Scott eviscerated the Democrats by revealing they had "_no desire to solve problems before the election_ " because they NEED these problems to incite racial hatred towards Republicans and win elections.
Then, with a look of intense determination on his face, Senator Tim Scott said _the_ _last_ _words_ _the_ _Democrats_ _ever_ _wanted_ _to_ _hear_ _him_ _say_ :
"I'm willing to compete for their vote. Are you?"
Now, the once quiet and agreeable Senator from South Carolina is on fire. He's on a mission to...
**☐** | **EXPOSE** the LIE that conservatives are all racists
---|---
**☐** | **RECLAIM** Black voters from the Democrat Party
**☐** | **END** the Democrats' stranglehold on Black voters
Tim has taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth – and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are ringing true and spreading like wildfire within the Black Community.
He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies...
**...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party.**
_And_ _the_ _Democrats_ _know_ _that_ _if_ _they_ _lose_ _their_ _stranglehold_ _on_ _Black_ _voters_ , _it'll_ _be_ _impossible_ _for_ _them_ _to_ _ever_ _win_ _another_ _election_!
That's why Democrats are so terrified of Tim Scott and THEY'LL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP!
[And that's why your signed endorsement to Tim Scott is so important!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=5)
Once I receive your signed endorsement, I'll send it directly to Senator Scott so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back!
[Along with your signed endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent contribution of $35, $50, $100 or more to help recruit your fellow conservatives to endorse & support Senator Tim Scott.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=6)
Or perhaps you understand how important Senator Tim Scott is to reclaiming Black voters, and you'd like to do more to help?
[Your generous contribution of $250, $500, $1000 or more will help purchase the critical advertising needed to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Senator Tim Scott to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=7)
**Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Senator Tim Scott because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all...**
**...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again.**
[So please sign your endorsement to Senator Tim Scott and make an urgent contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Senator Scott to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=8)
[Or if you can't afford that much right now, then please give $28 or even $20.22 as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=41802&info=2021EA0803&utm_content=2021EA0803&sal=Peter&utm_source=NationBuilder&utm_campaign=TimScott&utm_medium=Email&e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=9)
Thank you, and God Bless.
| _For America,_

Alvin Williams
President
---|---

If you no longer believe this is true, then [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=fd9793232b331ec4642cdda088197f3c&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ea0803_nd&n=10) to STOP receiving emails from Black America's PAC.

subject: ❗UN-CANCEL Derek Schmidt

body:
Critical race theory is a dangerous pillar of the radical left's agenda which seeks to further divide us by teaching children to hate America......... Friend, Critical race theory is a dangerous pillar of the radical left's agenda which seeks to further divide us by teaching children to hate America. Derek Schmidt opposes it wholeheartedly, and was even the very first candidate for Governor to sign the 1776 Action Pledge to Save Our Schools by keeping it out of Kansas. **...But not everyone agrees. In fact, he's UNDER ATTACK by the mainstream media for his stance. ** After a recent _Kansas City Star_ opinion piece criticized Derek's decision to sign the pledge, he was DENIED the chance to refute the article's claims unless he would make the arguments they wanted him to make. _The Star_ would not let him print his opposition to state-sponsored racism and the indoctrination of our kids. **Friend, this is a critical moment for our movement, and our state. We need your help to UN-CANCEL Derek and spread the word about the dangers of critical race theory. ** [**Will you chip in a few dollars to help?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=740118b0a80c49209c6c209c77924147&_e=VYxe6-Syu6vG_PPBtagvUlFn7KaGe6v5LkVNjmjm0DyjG8y6HCi1Yba_TUPITV7YowUICoj61CG0bAEsz4UVnjN4H8pZODxOV7INocGMKPVEdc5GFgMwNJJoiJOlicrl32VeXA51cyqshb95U3wLoXkuU4hTo6xpR7DF675SLWz20MH1-b3uXoNY6Z0epKJz_GrbHgWaIwvTJQSaR8dwrblcrv6OR27e-C1SKUI33nOPReqYsOtBKhO8IQ61JPEfKjo4eggYbRcd4-pipCH-osdJyalWaCjG6YIwq0-hHrLBrRIyrV-MIEQ3tke3wjPD57kcJDksY3zGuxPCpsbD88BSKvmaMsl2jnm-pWxX5ZAiKr8eIx9i5v4f3DFxLVX0pBEsvD7TOPwUgEoVuBvYYXHjGCmi07rAKoc2V2gGoDHnZ-bRAG8QMeMEaOhJPJg8VOgo0FAkfHwLezhQ6VTbNg%3D%3D) THEORY**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=740118b0a80c49209c6c209c77924147&_e=VYxe6-Syu6vG_PPBtagvUlFn7KaGe6v5LkVNjmjm0DyjG8y6HCi1Yba_TUPITV7YowUICoj61CG0bAEsz4UVnjN4H8pZODxOV7INocGMKPVEdc5GFgMwNJJoiJOlicrl32VeXA51cyqshb95U3wLoXkuU4hTo6xpR7DF675SLWz20MH1-b3uXoNY6Z0epKJz_GrbHgWaIwvTJQSaR8dwrblcrv6OR27e-C1SKUI33nPTRxccPn9BPWpXUJJSNGfH6eIC0M9OdmtY4UbkL71qcAgrRLVm2SzT2Ik45W09uo0MlLRm43-ihLD91bgueMzRc1xWq5yr4JzZin98xw8pCEhBvvcoPlHnUlbDnjXjMHwf5Twu0LQitnGPU-2IuKYmGik17ohvPUcaQhcHqQX-T02JdAIQss5d5Mh9DGJ8dO7MVGjNNUeNt1DF_nxzS8y08G3N2z67YrKeSaRaoIGGiQ%3D%3D) DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=740118b0a80c49209c6c209c77924147&_e=VYxe6-Syu6vG_PPBtagvUlFn7KaGe6v5LkVNjmjm0DyjG8y6HCi1Yba_TUPITV7YowUICoj61CG0bAEsz4UVnjN4H8pZODxOV7INocGMKPVEdc5GFgMwNJJoiJOlicrl32VeXA51cyqshb95U3wLoXkuU4hTo6xpR7DF675SLWz20MH1-b3uXoNY6Z0epKJz_GrbHgWaIwvTJQSaR8dwrblcrv6OR27e-C1SKUI33nNwTZaiqcJ3xxZuU_G190MeSTaJREGKOT1Iv-V3LIkLVnENL_1xGPkSe-81GzMKb750-WneOMXUX91KHIm0DV9jWeClE9WRgA7cwyY9nA0jpHFBtNwQUJxv4Bmuj4TxXs9QH3Ptx6eVSB3ITapIXIAJG7NlmtvdMIAQe3BVL3NhKylEO4Xu0D-bGXtDwOnWyPyHL9VmO8EK2BzqTEnH7Tu0rPrxWAz5yq3-Qtw3OiNEAQ%3D%3D) Friend, we've warned you about this before. We can't trust the media to treat conservatives fairly. If we're going to get our message out there, we're going to need to do it on our own. **But if the media are going to attempt to suppress Derek's voice, we're going to need your help. ** **By chipping in just a few dollars, you'll help fund key communications efforts to guarantee that every Kansas voter hears from Derek on the dangers of critical race theory.****Can we count on your help?** Whether it's television ads, radio ads, digital ads or something else... It's not cheap. We're going to need your help to get the word out [**Will you chip in immediately to help UN-CANCEL Derek and help us prevent critical race theory from taking root in Kansas?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=740118b0a80c49209c6c209c77924147&_e=VYxe6-Syu6vG_PPBtagvUlFn7KaGe6v5LkVNjmjm0DyjG8y6HCi1Yba_TUPITV7YowUICoj61CG0bAEsz4UVnjN4H8pZODxOV7INocGMKPVEdc5GFgMwNJJoiJOlicrl32VeXA51cyqshb95U3wLoXkuU4hTo6xpR7DF675SLWz20MH1-b3uXoNY6Z0epKJz_GrbHgWaIwvTJQSaR8dwrblcrv6OR27e-C1SKUI33nO9RSqykx0HhYdsuIHLYko4f1RbFSlwjCLKEe3xXl7iLu8q7l4sVdW9O6B4zrg7zWaySwpYBBiefuIQUw6eY0L8dYWVLfxdr7tNK0shcBWigGoJZwGPD4XPktgMMluT1jgq8-xw_x9FsXOWi5T9p_bWCyVPyg7c1mAvDVVl0ApLq5eZisw7csQdH2CMECIuHiOBklgSn0MBZ1FlEUa-WybBCjcU-roUE-ZV_ToxVGaT2w%3D%3D) Team Schmidt | |

clean_body: Critical race theory is a dangerous pillar of the radical left's agenda which seeks to further divide us by teaching children to hate America......... Friend, Critical race theory is a dangerous pillar of the radical left's agenda which seeks to further divide us by teaching children to hate America. Derek Schmidt opposes it wholeheartedly, and was even the very first candidate for Governor to sign the 1776 Action Pledge to Save Our Schools by keeping it out of Kansas. ...But not everyone agrees. In fact, he's UNDER ATTACK by the mainstream media for his stance. After a recent Kansas City Star opinion piece criticized Derek's decision to sign the pledge, he was DENIED the chance to refute the article's claims unless he would make the arguments they wanted him to make. The Star would not let him print his opposition to state-sponsored racism and the indoctrination of our kids. Friend, this is a critical moment for our movement, and our state. We need your help to UN-CANCEL Derek and spread the word about the dangers of critical race theory. Friend, we've warned you about this before. We can't trust the media to treat conservatives fairly. If we're going to get our message out there, we're going to need to do it on our own. But if the media are going to attempt to suppress Derek's voice, we're going to need your help. By chipping in just a few dollars, you'll help fund key communications efforts to guarantee that every Kansas voter hears from Derek on the dangers of critical race theory.Can we count on your help? Whether it's television ads, radio ads, digital ads or something else... It's not cheap. We're going to need your help to get the word out Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Cristina =?iso-8859-1?q?Tzintz=FAn?= Ramirez
subject: Tell the Senate: End the filibuster & protect voting rights
body:
| | | Texas Democrats bravely denied quorum to stop the latest push to suppress the vote in Austin. It’s time Senate Democrats in Washington showed the same courage.
---
| [Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32341254/295461456/-67813214?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWRlNWQyNi0xMWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsZDx6exkvOmv6YmSQS_STn24XGXEgVpr7MNW8sgUFw=&emci=13de5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1ade5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Yesterday, Democratic legislators in Texas flew to Washington, D.C. to deny a quorum and stop Republican plans to suppress the vote during a special legislative session. **
They’ve arrived in our nation’s capital in a last-ditch effort to renew the push to pass federal voting rights legislation. This bold maneuver could save us valuable time, but only if Senate Democrats get the message.
While Texas Democrats have gone to great lengths to safeguard our democracy, Democrats in Washington have failed to demonstrate the same level of urgency or unity over recent months. This has the potential to be a defining moment in our fight to protect the right to vote, but only if we speak out.
[Act now: Urge your senators to bypass the filibuster so we can save our democracy from extreme voter suppression.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32341255/295461457/-1990127515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWRlNWQyNi0xMWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsZDx6exkvOmv6YmSQS_STn24XGXEgVpr7MNW8sgUFw=&emci=13de5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1ade5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Earlier today, President Biden spoke at Philadelphia’s Constitution Center to outline what’s at stake in this moment. He made it very clear — if left unchecked, the Republican Party will continue to dismantle our core democratic principles and restrict access to the ballot box.
The GOP has shown they’re willing to do anything to be in power, even undermine our fundamental rights. Democrats in Congress must wake up to what is happening in states like Texas and around the country before it’s too late.
If an outdated rule like the filibuster is stopping the Democratic majority in Congress from passing popular, necessary legislation, then they must reform it or abolish it altogether. There’s no room for error in this pivotal moment.
[Send a message to your senators: End the filibuster so we can finally pass the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32341256/295461458/738755840?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWRlNWQyNi0xMWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsZDx6exkvOmv6YmSQS_STn24XGXEgVpr7MNW8sgUFw=&emci=13de5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1ade5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Thank you,
Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez
Executive Director
NextGen America
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/13de5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/1ade5d26-11e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWRlNWQyNi0xMWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsZDx6exkvOmv6YmSQS_STn24XGXEgVpr7MNW8sgUFw=&id=109799863)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: John's still waiting eagerly for your response, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You still haven't participated in our focus group...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210713-1980-header&t=1&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)
Peter, did you see John's email?
He reached out personally to ask if you'd be willing to participate in our official interactive Focus Group as we head into the third quarter of our campaign.
**We're hoping to review the results soon, but in order to get a truly representative sample, we're *still* looking for responses from you + a few more folks on this team.**
[**_Will you take a sec to join our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group before it closes? It's truly important that we get a representative sample of everyone on this incredible grassroots team._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=2&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)
**[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=3&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)**
Last week, CNN once again rated this Senate seat in Pennsylvania as the #1 most likely to flip in 2022. We're already proving to the world that we've got what it takes to defeat the GOP here in PA, but building the strongest campaign possible depends on crucial feedback from all of yinz.
[What issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21878?source=ema20210713-1980&t=4&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3) Select an issue: Health care COVID-19 Jobs and income equality Climate change Ending white nationalist domestic terrorism Weed legalization and justice Racial justice and reparations Unions and workers’ rights Affordable housing LGBTQIA+ rights Ending Washington corruption Education Immigrants’ rights Ending forever wars Campaign finance reform Gun violence prevention College affordability and student debt Reproductive justice Ending the opioid epidemic **[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=5&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)**
---
[**_Please, Peter: Will you answer a few quick questions as part of our official online Focus Group to help our team decide what we should focus on in Q3?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=6&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)
We really do read every response, so we can't wait to hear from you.
Team Fetterman HQ __
\--------Forwarded email--------
Sender: John Fetterman
Date: Thursday, July 8, 2021
Subject Line: fwd: Focus group (please respond)
Peter, our team launched our *official* Q3 Grassroots Focus Group yesterday, and the response we've seen so far has been through the roof.
But I gotta admit... I took a quick peek at our records, and I noticed one big thing missing:
**You still haven't participated yet, Peter!**
[**_Click here to enter our official online Focus Group right away. I promise it'll only take a moment._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=7&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)
**[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=8&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)**
You see, it's _suuuuper_ important to me to hear exactly where you stand on the issues, and what you think about the overall trajectory of our campaign.
The only way we can win this ultra-competitive Senate seat is if each of us does our part to make a personal stake in this race — **so please take a few minutes to be a part of our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group right now. I'm really eager to hear what you think.**
[What issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21878?source=ema20210713-1980&t=9&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3) Select an issue: Health care COVID-19 Jobs and income equality Climate change Ending white nationalist domestic terrorism Weed legalization and justice Racial justice and reparations Unions and workers’ rights Affordable housing LGBTQIA+ rights Ending Washington corruption Education Immigrants’ rights Ending forever wars Campaign finance reform Gun violence prevention College affordability and student debt Reproductive justice Ending the opioid epidemic **[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=10&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)**
---
[**_Peter, our Focus Group is still running, but it won’t be open forever. So please, will you answer a few quick questions as part of our official online Focus Group to help our team decide what we should focus on in Q3?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=11&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)
I can't wait to hear from you.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. The surest way we can flip this Senate seat in 2022 is by coming together to build a campaign that is truly representative of all of our country's working people — and that requires direct feedback from folks like you. [**_Nobody's a better representative of your state than you when it comes to sharing your thoughts, Peter, so please take a moment to start our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-q3-focus-group/?source=em20210713-1980&t=12&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210713-1980-footer&t=13&refcode2=1980_434096_U97CO3&akid=1980%2E434096%2EU97CO3)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
