name: Derek Marshall
subject: The ocean’s on fire and we’re in a drought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Big business can’t buy my vote...

Hi Peter,
I can’t believe that I have to actually say this outloud and it’s not part of another _end of the world_ movie, but:
**The ocean’s on fire.**
We’re in the middle of a drought and the ocean is actually on fire.
I’m sure you already saw that news this weekend though—it was hard to miss. An underwater pipeline bursting just off shore in the Gulf of Mexico, causing the ocean to boil and flames to burst from the water is like some sort of dystopian nightmare. Did you see what else came to light this weekend though?
An ExxonMobil lobbyist was caught on camera bragging about having power and control over enough members of Congress to remove or weaken the life-saving climate change measures in the infrastructure plan
**This is exactly why I am running a campaign that is refusing corporate money, because my vote will never be up for sale to the highest bidder. **

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32342297/295466713/474536728?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzEyYWZlYS0xNGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBt-ysBPEECkNg3mxr6R2KDoZkhPtg2fWNyGOdlTf5g=)
I simply don’t believe that we have time to compromise with corporate interests and lobbyists who care more about their own pocketbooks than the people of our communities.

clean_body: Big business can’t buy my vote... Hi Peter, I can’t believe that I have to actually say this outloud and it’s not part of another end of the world movie, but: The ocean’s on fire. We’re in the middle of a drought and the ocean is actually on fire. I’m sure you already saw that news this weekend though—it was hard to miss. An underwater pipeline bursting just off shore in the Gulf of Mexico, causing the ocean to boil and flames to burst from the water is like some sort of dystopian nightmare. Did you see what else came to light this weekend though? An ExxonMobil lobbyist was caught on camera bragging about having power and control over enough members of Congress to remove or weaken the life-saving climate change measures in the infrastructure plan This is exactly why I am running a campaign that is refusing corporate money, because my vote will never be up for sale to the highest bidder. = I simply don’t believe that we have time to compromise with corporate interests and lobbyists who care more about their own pocketbooks than the people of our communities. Half of our country is facing an unprecedented drought while the land around us burns, and it’s communities like CA-08 that are on the frontlines of the fight against climate change. It’s why I’m such a staunch supporter of the Green New Deal. And it’s why I need your help. = Together we can take on climate change and the corporate interests that continue to place their profits over our lives. In Solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for Congress, CA-08 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Critical race theory is absurd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Critical race theory has no place in public schools. Agree or disagree? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58430892:W_6XeadNg:m:1:2247059263:538A8F96A135B0F8AB72F5221BC50F8D:r)
---

Peter,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58430892:W_6XeadNg:m:1:2247059263:538A8F96A135B0F8AB72F5221BC50F8D:r)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country's past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we've learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they're going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Peter, it's critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation's largest teacher's union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58430892:W_6XeadNg:m:1:2247059263:538A8F96A135B0F8AB72F5221BC50F8D:r)** _

POLL REQUEST FOR: {{email}}

Response Deadline: Monday, July 12th

[** TAKE OUR POLL BEFORE MIDNIGHT->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58430892:W_6XeadNg:m:1:2247059263:538A8F96A135B0F8AB72F5221BC50F8D:r)

---

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It's "_e pluribus unum_ " - out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Peter, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It's so important that we stop the Democrats before they start indoctrinating our children with obscure ideas from the fringe Left](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58430892:W_6XeadNg:m:1:2247059263:538A8F96A135B0F8AB72F5221BC50F8D:r)**.

Thank you,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58430892:W_6XeadNg:m:1:2247059263:538A8F96A135B0F8AB72F5221BC50F8D:r)
Jim Jordan

Delaware, OH 43015

name: Mark Kelly
subject: humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a donation to support this campaign. But before I ask, I first want to express my gratitude for all you’ve done to get us to this moment.
Thanks to your efforts last year, we brought real change to Congress. I’m amazed by the grassroots team we’ve built and the power we have to improve people’s lives.
But as we’ve known all along, the election was just a beginning. The real work begins now, and it has never been more urgent for us to deliver change for Americans.
So far, we’ve delivered relief to millions of Americans during the COVID crisis, and worked to rebuild our economy. But National Republicans have made clear they’re still set on taking this seat.
**We have to do everything we can to hold this seat, and I’m going to need you with me, friend. That’s why today I have to ask:**
[**If you’re able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and fight for change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210713-1-15&t=1&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=14&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=15&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=16&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=17&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=18&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210713-1-15&t=19&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**
---
****
I’m going to check back in over the course of the month to update you on our progress. I’m hopeful that with your support we can continue fueling this people-powered campaign to improve people’s lives.
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you’ve put into this campaign. It means the world to me to have so many of you supporting us and the fight for our shared values.
Full speed ahead!
— Mark
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210713-1-15&t=20&refcode2=936_6688874_zcqxgl&akid=936%2E6688874%2Ezcqxgl)**

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I need your help today
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends ––

As you may know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in
California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and
anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.

They pose a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and
across the country. They’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight
for a cleaner planet, comprehensive immigration reform, or election
security.

So I need your help today.
Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the recall
are going to set their sights on our campaign as well.

I plan on doing everything I can to hold this seat, but any amount of help
you can give today would go a long way. And that’s why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?refcode=em210713-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=155_159979_E-FYaS&akid=155%2E159979%2EE-FYaS ]Will you make a
$3
contribution to our grassroots campaign today? We’ve got so much work to
do in the coming months, and every donation we receive in July sends a
powerful message that we will not back down without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution

clean_body: [1]Alex Padilla for Senate Friends –– As you may know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees. They pose a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and across the country. They’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight for a cleaner planet, comprehensive immigration reform, or election security. So I need your help today. Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the recall are going to set their sights on our campaign as well. I plan on doing everything I can to hold this seat, but any amount of help you can give today would go a long way. And that’s why I have to ask: [ ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots campaign today? We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation we receive in July sends a powerful message that we will not back down without a fight. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: [ ]Donate $3 [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other amount It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for everything you do — it means so much to me to be alongside you in this fight. —Alex [ ]DONATE NOW You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

body:
Hey Peter,

Democrats hold the slimmest 50-50 majority in the Senate. That’s why Republicans are able to create roadblocks for progress by abusing the archaic filibuster to block legislation from reaching President Joe Biden's desk -- and Ron Johnson is at the front of the pack.

We need to elect a leader who will focus on doing right by Wisconsin workers and families, not the wealthy special interests or corporate PACs trying to buy up elections. **We need Sarah Godlewski to replace Ron Johnson.**

But the thing about Sarah that Ron Johnson and his Republican allies don't want you to know? **Sarah has won two statewide campaigns, and she beat her GOP opponent by more than 100,000 votes in 2018. She’ll do it again to defeat Ron Johnson in 2022 -- with your help.**

[**We can't flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat without the support of grassroots donors to help us take on Ron Johnson and his special interest supporters. subject: re: Updating your official Supporter Record

body:
We need your support right now before the establishment starts a shadow campaign for a moderate candidate of their choosing.
#
Hi, happy Tuesday! Can I update your official campaign Supporter Record?
Over the weekend, I spent a few hours finally catching up on some stuff after end-of-quarter (got to inbox zero, if you can believe it).
**There was one big thing I noticed. We’re not even halfway through July, and our fundraising is already slowing down significantly.**
Compared to last month, we’re down by 13.69%. So Erica asked me to pull a list of online supporters who haven’t donated to our campaign yet. Here’s what we had on file for you:
**_Supporter Record #297: Erica Smith for U.S. Senate_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5142?refcode=em20210713-254&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=254%2E3698%2EpR6KKD)**
---
Please keep in mind that Erica is our movement’s best chance at electing a truly progressive senator in North Carolina. She is bold, she is unapologetic, she is fearless — and she is the only candidate in the race who supports Medicare for All, reparations, and a Green New Deal.
**We need your support right now before the establishment starts a shadow campaign for a moderate candidate of their choosing.** Already, our Democratic primary opponents are accepting campaign cash from some of the biggest establishment PACs out there.
[**_If you’re able to do so, please consider making a donation to our campaign to elect Erica Smith for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. Once you do that, I can update your Supporter Record in my files!_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5142?refcode=em20210713-254&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=254%2E3698%2EpR6KKD)
**Suggested Donation: $5****[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5142?refcode=em20210713-254&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=254%2E3698%2EpR6KKD)**
Thanks for all you do,
Jayla
Jayla Gilliam, Finance Director

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210713-254-footer&t=4&refcode2=254_3698_pR6KKD&akid=254%2E3698%2EpR6KKD)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

subject: Hispanics are walking away from the do-nothing Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS
body:
News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. I know what it’s like to live in a corrupt country, I won't let America become a socialist nation. News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. We left behind socialist countries and we won’t let America become a socialist nation. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=862789fe62634c03aa55756722033cdd&_e=YYY-Az-9Q_tkl1f5q-NW_IFSfEHUCWhg1kpTArGpYezfWSYPHMgkkT3Nsq0LRk60fAipw4Es-OTexkjOhxRKmEuSQSpCz3aVVLQM49N23V-3lhd_ZmR70LiRJTUG8TvzwOAdKbjsZGkBe70UKR7ZEtSUKfA7Y4wMAppG92iKPgRi7bP6CEEFxr__waoYWgWgpnyaHvw-6BAYWMx2hFjk8DOJI_4rG62hBNCZgIF2UCQlaVP5tmRnDpog9xtyQddBGHvA8yR8dUi9HfwPWSe88P-uImMY5BvXEgK1GxLkR4KZylSFFKdGCj5L49yJnZbYDiYXyvooDZwRHbolUaTY-Db5Rt_HOE6o9NSL4FA_ZN7hgT4bnTDjKCL6yNVnJN8u-v_d8PaikTmz1kUwSS5yqcNUrrUu9DgBCb4xV7MdLPLXGk-I_iKOvH2FCwBGQATZ7JQJR2ZOekpXcUuLdKeJO-ANpGxC6y6qxxmqennIKw0%3D)

Fellow American - - Democrats think that to be Hispanic, you must vote Blue.

We should welcome them to the 21st century because, I don’t know if you’ve heard - _but Hispanics are no longer all Democrats._

That’s right, thanks to former President Donald Trump’s common-sense policies and the liberal’s insane socialist logic, the tides are turning. **_The Democrat’s socialist agenda does not align with Hispanic’s conservative values any longer._**

Frankly, it’s racist that Democrats think that skin color has anything to do with political ideology.

You may not know me, so I want to take a minute to introduce myself. My name is Jose Castillo. I was born in New Orleans but grew up in Honduras with a strong, single mother before returning to the United States. I now live in Florida with my beautiful wife and daughter, living the American dream.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=862789fe62634c03aa55756722033cdd&_e=YYY-Az-9Q_tkl1f5q-NW_IFSfEHUCWhg1kpTArGpYezfWSYPHMgkkT3Nsq0LRk60fAipw4Es-OTexkjOhxRKmEuSQSpCz3aVVLQM49N23V-3lhd_ZmR70LiRJTUG8TvzwOAdKbjsZGkBe70UKR7ZEtSUKfA7Y4wMAppG92iKPgRi7bP6CEEFxr__waoYWgWgpnyaHvw-6BAYWMx2hFjk8DOJI_4rG62hBNCZgIF2UCQlaVP5tmRnDpog9xtyQddBGHvA8yR8dUi9HfwPWSe88J3RCB1JAxPRsPZ2HutBFXMOqwZNU5VdjrqltLreUUkkeKQa2eE4UiyT4cplP1NY2JN-JKfAXDGw4kKfn-x8gXhVjs-YBpj5IlF1YeAMvRLbKbX9ud38GVEeVlbYFTMvnjGKTPN_xBQL0-fPgtuKWMfc4EQSJCx7mtwlcaID5ZOsffxDTX63a-nbv49BfciFnem1o8e6qFYYFDtZHEZpUTw%3D)
_This is me during Donald Trump’s ‘Save America’ Rally in Florida in July_
After witnessing the Democrats destroy Donald Trump’s America-First agenda, I decided to run for Congress in Florida’s 9th district. I’m a pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment, and pro-America First conservative. I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. [**It would be an honor if you would chip in $10 to help elect a Hispanic conservative from Florida to take on the Democrats and make Congress great again.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=862789fe62634c03aa55756722033cdd&_e=YYY-Az-9Q_tkl1f5q-NW_IFSfEHUCWhg1kpTArGpYezfWSYPHMgkkT3Nsq0LRk60fAipw4Es-OTexkjOhxRKmEuSQSpCz3aVVLQM49N23V-3lhd_ZmR70LiRJTUG8TvzwOAdKbjsZGkBe70UKR7ZEtSUKfA7Y4wMAppG92iKPgRi7bP6CEEFxr__waoYWgWgpnyaHvw-6BAYWMx2hFjk8DOJI_4rG62hBNCZgIF2UCQlaVP5tmRnDpog9xtyQddBGHvA8yR8dUi9HfwPWSe88Cmt48IiJBIUtIJfjI77mwJnn6e1Qn6jDKBIsdRUjx1IKL6bOJXA7gTWBPmIkb73Q6IivFjYZ60cMt9TcKNXGzpMUwP9a98IJNvjE1h0nm9CINQ4WHUi9GID9-GHenmtmAchdzRCPsJdTEMmDUY0ydf7XWe5fPxdKJcY20eltHEtXf_pdeUPIxkbqGUuP2PGOAEkMvmbibI-Bimh8OfnC4M%3D)

[ Make Congress Great Again
Support Jose »](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=862789fe62634c03aa55756722033cdd&_e=YYY-Az-9Q_tkl1f5q-NW_IFSfEHUCWhg1kpTArGpYezfWSYPHMgkkT3Nsq0LRk60fAipw4Es-OTexkjOhxRKmEuSQSpCz3aVVLQM49N23V-3lhd_ZmR70LiRJTUG8TvzwOAdKbjsZGkBe70UKR7ZEtSUKfA7Y4wMAppG92iKPgRi7bP6CEEFxr__waoYWgWgpnyaHvw-6BAYWMx2hFjk8DOJI_4rG62hBNCZgIF2UCQlaVP5tmRnDpog9xtyQddBGHvA8yR8dUi9HfwPWSe88Ai2-SL1DrJZdOtvjdxrohzLO0kbvL8cy1qDWM4DoGvgkZCy7BGynzqKH392wYDFEbO-yUjB2TEgy9Yp7dRwpAH0pWI7NXRNWGR-1n6CrucrTlVQ_-XZniXuLGQFqnvuwxD1dDK98yZ9YI-jO4Mbvpqiof1Spbjk_c-CSVxv6X95NeL1lDba1tAh4CH-xPCixG-tdaMv5JaSnyJ25izrxMg%3D)
Hispanics are walking away from the racist, do-nothing Democrats once and for all. Their ‘values’ do not equate to the same things we want. We want secure borders, an open economy, common-sense policies, and we strongly oppose allowing the U.S. to become a socialist nation.

**We want liberal logic out of our lives.**

Here’s the deal - Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you we have a real opportunity to unseat a Democrat and flip a blue seat RED! Thank you for your time, I look forward to fighting for our shared conservative values and making Congress GREAT (Republican) again!

God Bless,

There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. Hispanics are walking away from the racist, do-nothing Democrats once and for all. Their ‘values’ do not equate to the same things we want. We want secure borders, an open economy, common-sense policies, and we strongly oppose allowing the U.S. to become a socialist nation. We want liberal logic out of our lives. Here’s the deal - Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you we have a real opportunity to unseat a Democrat and flip a blue seat RED! Thank you for your time, I look forward to fighting for our shared conservative values and making Congress GREAT (Republican) again! God Bless, Jose Castillo Republican for Congress | | PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS Jose Castillo for Congress PO Box 2651 Davenport, FL 33836 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

* **Over $51 million for Nevada projects,** **including funding for interstates, a high-speed rail, and Amtrak**
* Expanded resources for **reducing carbon pollution**
* A program aimed at **achieving racial equity** by modifying bridges that separate communities of color from the rest of their cities
* Improvements that target **making infrastructure resistant to extreme weather events**

Strengthening our infrastructure is a top priority for me, and I know that it’s a top priority for Nevadans.
Nevada needs an infrastructure plan that does more than just patch up roads -- this year we’ve dealt with _record-breaking temperatures, extreme drought, and low water levels in Lake Mead._ **That's why I added an amendment to this bill that ensures future infrastructure investments can withstand the effects of climate change.**
This bill is absolutely necessary, and we're on our way toward revitalizing our nation’s infrastructure -- but we’re not at the finish line yet. **I need to know you’re with me on this.** [Will you sign on in support of the INVEST Act so we can keep the ball rolling?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32345642/295478387/1267397459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk1NzY2Ni0xZmU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sj0BojlmQfZzwIe6VWFlnYqjZgLqTlcexzXmaJl5150=&emci=f719f465-3ce3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=04957666-1fe4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

clean_body: | = | | Team -- BIG news: I’m proud to have voted for the INVEST in America Act, a bipartisan bill that will rebuild infrastructure across the country and lay the groundwork for a sustainable, equitable future. The INVEST Act tackles the challenges facing our current infrastructure needs head on and includes: Over $51 million for Nevada projects, including funding for interstates, a high-speed rail, and Amtrak Expanded resources for reducing carbon pollution A program aimed at achieving racial equity by modifying bridges that separate communities of color from the rest of their cities Improvements that target making infrastructure resistant to extreme weather events This piece of transformative legislation is a must-pass, and I need your support to make sure we don’t lose momentum! | | | Strengthening our infrastructure is a top priority for me, and I know that it’s a top priority for Nevadans. Nevada needs an infrastructure plan that does more than just patch up roads -- this year we’ve dealt with record-breaking temperatures, extreme drought, and low water levels in Lake Mead. That's why I added an amendment to this bill that ensures future infrastructure investments can withstand the effects of climate change. This bill is absolutely necessary, and we're on our way toward revitalizing our nation’s infrastructure -- but we’re not at the finish line yet. I need to know you’re with me on this. | | Let’s keep pushing for progress, Susie | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Peter-
Look at these liars.

---
| Texas House Democrats are regurgitating the same tired lie about "voter suppression" that has been debunked countless times. Why? So they can skip work, sip beer, and take a charter jet to hang out with Pelosi in DC for a few days and block a commonsense bill in the Texas legislature to make our elections more secure.
I thought Democrats said the filibuster was a "Jim Crow relic".... Isn't that exactly what they're doing now? Filibustering debate on an election security bill and lying about what the bill would actually do?

---
| And how do they describe their actions? They call it a SACRIFICE.
---
|
---
| Seriously?! It's hard to imagine a more delusional group of people.
But we do need to take this seriously. The liberal media is more than happy to push this false narrative of "voter suppression" so that Nancy Pelosi has an excuse to pass H.R. 1 - which would put the radical socialist Democrat party in charge of EVERY ELECTION ACROSS THE COUNTRY.
They want to ban all forms of voter ID. They want to allow illegal immigrants to vote. They want to use your taxpayer dollars to pay for Democrat campaign commercials.

There's a lot of posturing in DC, but the last thing we need to be debating is if Donald Trump should be Speaker. But the crazy thing is, _if the GOP takes back the House, it 's an actual possibility._ **We are just starting to reverse the dangerous policies the Trump Administration put in place, and we can 't afford to have such a dangerous man anywhere near elected office ever again.**
That's why we're reaching out to ask for support to stop this from happening.
Republicans are only 5 seats away from taking the majority and if they win, Matt Gaetz will lead the effort to make Donald Trump the Speaker.
**Josh 's seat is especially important:** national Republicans have put him on their target list, spending millions of dollars in dark money against him. California Democrats already lost four swing seats last year, and Josh was the only Democrat in a deep purple district to win. We need him to defend the razor-thin Democratic majority in Congress.
[**Can you chip in $15 or more so we can protect Josh 's seat and STOP Donald Trump from taking back power in Washington?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Uux5245Ir7CocnOSKQ4xuY__w8fMkUUAHzkft70hKLc=/Ewwz13hDJt5eBtpDSZuYhfwajZRlDAWxk4-tyUyZ-zg=?refcode=E10159-20210713-TrumpSpeaker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Team Harder

body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| Hello Peter,
---
| The recall election is coming up very soon, on September 14, and Gavin Newsom just proved he is not fit to govern.
A California judge just [denied](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mhZaJrgdt_H0_t1ULmGXWqpVI64rRlE175Cu-5mBeQWqMHbCCo6XEx5v79tPouG0ENl4ZoHc1fK3UBbSGTByLW_ml3X83S0lTKIYS7CBu9KYykPEs1yYPnKrtMjOnDQOk80X2vf3B79Pl2yyFZ26bb92xeQhnO0HvMV_wKKPqZkbbJ-4pvLZR_MxMXS8fkhmjTNvCmoRJp-XvbxAWESGLNgXmPVWSPc-Tp0u1PyID39CQESnUxidMA==&c=7M4AD5isHoNsqusIvYZmn-cR33vniVjVI29DooMKZ2JBp-iYYVFJvg==&ch=AaxBh6ALWH0J2CFY1zKqbZ1PvvBGggZYLN-b_52NgkBkIMoPeIQygQ==) Newsom's lawsuit, where he sued his own Secretary of State to be allowed to list himself as a Democrat on the recall ballot. And the denial is due to nothing but Newsom's own incompetence. You see, there's a deadline that must be met if an officeholder wants to include his/her party affiliation on a recall ballot.
The really great part is that it was Newsom himself who [signed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mhZaJrgdt_H0_t1ULmGXWqpVI64rRlE175Cu-5mBeQWqMHbCCo6XEx5v79tPouG0H9JMIcJ3nPEnZAzunn7hNnueub3RR51lkYHc5BbnAb45w2yYt6G-8MSvST4sclkckuSGbknCpnWR9ce8unaDr4pV7f0mKsMGOD8U6Q2D6FVSILKVM2BMDiWOjmAF0KOJsg0D0COScFoSu6_CMLudJKMxptjybV_ssi2Af4JdHT-ZcNgW8AZOCgAuSxctVwFwLX8cUdJwH4A9qL9KsJbsHmgMZvntd64tP0xPX3ccZ1peGyFZio6yLQ==&c=7M4AD5isHoNsqusIvYZmn-cR33vniVjVI29DooMKZ2JBp-iYYVFJvg==&ch=AaxBh6ALWH0J2CFY1zKqbZ1PvvBGggZYLN-b_52NgkBkIMoPeIQygQ==) the 2019 law that requires officeholders to ask to have their party preference put on the ballot. If they fail to do so, no party affiliation is listed. And Newsom failed.

Gov. Newsom hasn't just failed himself with his incompetence, he has failed California. His liberal policies during the worst parts of the Covid-19 pandemic hurt Californians immensely. And the denial is due to nothing but Newsom's own incompetence. You see, there's a deadline that must be met if an officeholder wants to include his/her party affiliation on a recall ballot. Fellow American,

We're in the dog days of summer. America is back. If you've been to the airport recently, you've seen that people are on the move once again. It's a blessing that Americans are free to travel without restrictions. For Senate Republicans, that blessing is also a curse. This summer is critical to our success. We are projected to have some of our lowest fundraising yet, and we can't let that happen.

I know from my own email inbox that Democrats are pressing on with their fundraising, and we can’t let them start to build a competitive advantage. In 2020, Democrats raised more than $5.5 billion in their efforts to win the Senate majority, which they did by the skin of their teeth.

If we’re going to stand a chance of coming out on top next year, we can’t let the fundraising slow down for even one day – despite the summer travel season. So, I’m asking you this – **[will you help me make it as hard as possible for Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a8a6a62058541cd9dbadb670536b2aa&_e=anayvjtL_UlcSYqIp9kzgBYDetF_oaAycxX3rmGEp7gmHrQ77mGYcZu8aMFM0MhwfN33xkt99yuyDxixRYS0eE_Uxab-45vC7D3tuO7KVgnd4dRHFQPCys6WdYxoA2l-cbRk0jvVsPAdNiQ-XkW3QIYShexKZ9IGBBrNqFOWsU1hWJcpP6CHBbJ0vBJuHZEweFstDXoicRgbWxD97VyDU1XhNtq36F78Ugyi1nC6hCqonsIF3KeXwIbNiLCChiAjfC8E4Q_bkJtCKyhnArWn9EuDZbDeuBg7HH5C979k4a-ST2xGGkFOno1f3cPcSk1EdKmRO2gaQ6U0ayLnG1sm3Mh8XQvBByNPzuo8CWsMKynKT-Bhz3DrQViT8R-JrZSbnxoK1PBaPVzINEKgtLsxWED9AqNJzL0oG-RHco3LxEo8dXtDFh_odrRW1gn_xAIMtDIbXfM1-h6LoYUvjNpbwrY1lTbManzIykaPeV7-1a8%3D)**

We have to take it one day at a time, so today **[I’m looking for 1,500 conservatives to deposit just $5 into our Senate Majority Fund](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a8a6a62058541cd9dbadb670536b2aa&_e=anayvjtL_UlcSYqIp9kzgBYDetF_oaAycxX3rmGEp7gmHrQ77mGYcZu8aMFM0MhwfN33xkt99yuyDxixRYS0eE_Uxab-45vC7D3tuO7KVgnd4dRHFQPCys6WdYxoA2l-cbRk0jvVsPAdNiQ-XkW3QIYShexKZ9IGBBrNqFOWsU1hWJcpP6CHBbJ0vBJuHZEweFstDXoicRgbWxD97VyDU1XhNtq36F78Ugyi1nC6hCqonsIF3KeXwIbNiLCChiAjfC8E4Q_bkJtCKyhnArWn9E8MmKy6dplWkbzFKlX4Tgd_3LepBLnzt8o0RMiZkj3b1lhXHPxbWEPV-HccjrCeHxQ4lHls0O47OvlLGdiIJYiKsbjdQLe1vcY0HesuTv2aI4W5I7973Kcl3WSEFUNN1iksUznhMDm4NqDQYF9E9L838NZkqwBkCzeoFmOjqVYYlSeuZE-gGYm9sHNJXybLKoeKUdoX1HfFeNQiO-Moqdc%3D)**. It may not sound like much, but every day we’re bringing in money, the better positioned we will be to topple the far Left in 2022.

| [**DEPOSIT $5 INTO OUR SENATE MAJORITY FUND** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a8a6a62058541cd9dbadb670536b2aa&_e=anayvjtL_UlcSYqIp9kzgBYDetF_oaAycxX3rmGEp7gmHrQ77mGYcZu8aMFM0MhwfN33xkt99yuyDxixRYS0eE_Uxab-45vC7D3tuO7KVgnd4dRHFQPCys6WdYxoA2l-cbRk0jvVsPAdNiQ-XkW3QIYShexKZ9IGBBrNqFOWsU1hWJcpP6CHBbJ0vBJuHZEweFstDXoicRgbWxD97VyDU1XhNtq36F78Ugyi1nC6hCqonsIF3KeXwIbNiLCChiAjfC8E4Q_bkJtCKyhnArWn9N5ht94Dby0e342S6CuBOrE908TpuYX1nna-L4NAOFgAiITDBZCI2NcngAATpYbnqutXQoqp4DoJdbg_dbNrbtEeH0Adp_6KNMGyDOirWX44jZW_uXy-QN3jY010LLDnT3rEYzXp0-Tl5lz1TxO3GD1EPGL0qvwlIe0qnzyPGiQYaqYqZ73Nd2JdGJGcObxrh_fPYuDYim6Zw_OY3C5Q5Hg%3D)

Last year we witnessed 8/10 most expensive Senate races on the record books. If that’s any indication of what’s to come in 2022, then we’re in for a ride; If you’re curious as to why my colleagues and I are reaching out to you in July 2021, that’s why. **[Raising the campaign cash we will need to defeat the far Left takes years to amass.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a8a6a62058541cd9dbadb670536b2aa&_e=anayvjtL_UlcSYqIp9kzgBYDetF_oaAycxX3rmGEp7gmHrQ77mGYcZu8aMFM0MhwfN33xkt99yuyDxixRYS0eE_Uxab-45vC7D3tuO7KVgnd4dRHFQPCys6WdYxoA2l-cbRk0jvVsPAdNiQ-XkW3QIYShexKZ9IGBBrNqFOWsU1hWJcpP6CHBbJ0vBJuHZEweFstDXoicRgbWxD97VyDU1XhNtq36F78Ugyi1nC6hCqonsIF3KeXwIbNiLCChiAjfC8E4Q_bkJtCKyhnArWn9IKaR64inKtCeik3AyzSxpmVwn7glCJq6ZhzptcO8KBn9gNy8BjJPlHaOdlcDIiWShpF4VUip8RoiN26jWdCwrfXlU6C1-tKuCtqX5_OHfDBEht6NTv7SNdYoXP_nyOZJjkWX88sq-9GzvrdS_0bnYzQjJBWzpY1SwWFCaibpK5iZhyNVg-DOb6pmgD_Scb1Ly50h97afz-bOXWh1D3V_Tc%3D)**

So, in light of the deep, deep debt Democrats are putting the country into, **[would you please consider a $5 deposit into our Senate Majority Fund today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9a8a6a62058541cd9dbadb670536b2aa&_e=anayvjtL_UlcSYqIp9kzgBYDetF_oaAycxX3rmGEp7gmHrQ77mGYcZu8aMFM0MhwfN33xkt99yuyDxixRYS0eE_Uxab-45vC7D3tuO7KVgnd4dRHFQPCys6WdYxoA2l-cbRk0jvVsPAdNiQ-XkW3QIYShexKZ9IGBBrNqFOWsU1hWJcpP6CHBbJ0vBJuHZEweFstDXoicRgbWxD97VyDU1XhNtq36F78Ugyi1nC6hCqonsIF3KeXwIbNiLCChiAjfC8E4Q_bkJtCKyhnArWn9BD3DHVT8DdlKDxP3Lsa5KJcD2Mp9yfuR5cuMcYE3fsWhhuKc9WckaHGgVJi9U6V0WKHsXDNAobk6b_d7GOoBEbR_fwNHXsTZdnJiOABd7WXf0cZCvkJOB7n_He1ocTf7puZjP_JwQxw4uNtJsCZEaRWBK26yQoxJUWCdgJper6GcX0Gb8gMP7HoezadDzndcinIfekwrkRGeiKXd3XmrJ4%3D)** We sincerely need all of the help we can get.

clean_body: I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today... Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, We're in the dog days of summer. America is back. If you've been to the airport recently, you've seen that people are on the move once again. It's a blessing that Americans are free to travel without restrictions. For Senate Republicans, that blessing is also a curse. This summer is critical to our success. We are projected to have some of our lowest fundraising yet, and we can't let that happen. I know from my own email inbox that Democrats are pressing on with their fundraising, and we can’t let them start to build a competitive advantage. In 2020, Democrats raised more than $5.5 billion in their efforts to win the Senate majority, which they did by the skin of their teeth. If we’re going to stand a chance of coming out on top next year, we can’t let the fundraising slow down for even one day – despite the summer travel season. So, I’m asking you this – We have to take it one day at a time, so today . It may not sound like much, but every day we’re bringing in money, the better positioned we will be to topple the far Left in 2022. | Last year we witnessed 8/10 most expensive Senate races on the record books. If that’s any indication of what’s to come in 2022, then we’re in for a ride; If you’re curious as to why my colleagues and I are reaching out to you in July 2021, that’s why. So, in light of the deep, deep debt Democrats are putting the country into, We sincerely need all of the help we can get. Respectfully, Senator Josh Hawley If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Josh Hawley
subject: 3 Reasons to keep fighting the Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "radical left") Peter: The radical left has decided that America is broken beyond repair and that it needs to be torn down and rebuilt as a socialist nation - with them at the top. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "Tweet")They are happy to see our border overrun, our communities mired in crime and our children indoctrinated with Critical Race Theory that will teach them lies and encourage them to hate one another. When Joe Biden seeks to appoint cabinet members or other administration officials who have championed those divisive ideologies, I've worked hard to oppose their Senate Confirmation and ensured my colleagues knew the truth about the individual sitting before us at those hearings. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "Headline")He appoints criminals to the cabinet and allows our cities to crumble just to appease his liberal base. Then, he will sell out your family to stay in power. **These people are dangerous radicals - one was a part of an eco-terrorist organization, and the Labor Secretary had two of his aides convicted of extortion while he was a Mayor of Boston.** I am fighting every day to stop Biden and his radical friends from deconstructing our nation, but I can see now that the fight will be long. **[I need to know you will stand by my side and will continue to support my efforts.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "I need to know you will stand by my side and will continue to
support my efforts.")** The radical left's tactics are insidious:
* They cheered as BLM and Antifa **_burned American cities_** last summer, then they **_defunded_** the police even in the face of a spiking crime rate.
* They **_opened the border_** to allow the drug cartels and terrorists free access to our streets.
* Now they want to **_teach_** your children that they are inherently racist and can only be saved by liberal policies.
* They even **_defamed_** our nation on the 4th of July.

They are escalating their attempts to destroy our great nation, and we need to step up the fight. While you're enjoying a summer of freedom, they are working to fund their pet projects in the name of "infrastructure," and want us to believe that cash for illegal aliens, Medicare for all, defunding the police or Green New Deal style policies will help our nation's economy recover. Quite the opposite. Those policies will destroy our nation and that's why I'm not taking a day off. **These radical leftists know I see them for what they are, and that makes me a target. It 's why they keep trying to cancel me.** **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928150:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal
Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "Family")Joe Biden isn't going to stop them. Quite the opposite; he's encouraging them. But unlike Biden, I've got three good reasons to keep fighting against the radical left agenda in Washington, and these three motivate me to ensure I succeed. So, every day, you can count on me to be a thorn in the side of the Biden Administration and do my part to keep America the greatest country on earth, where we embrace Independence Day and thank our Founding Fathers for standing up to tyranny, even when it cost most of them everything they held dear. I'm still fighting. **[Will you help me succeed?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "Will you help me succeed?")** For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57928149:6RtThPlHN:m:1:3253819041:254F4F3A164DD3754EC620A6B6A4E235:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**

And if this trend keeps up, it could spell disaster in November. = While Youngkin pumps seemingly unlimited amounts of money into his campaign, Virginia Democrats are counting on grassroots support from people like you to build the movement we need to keep the Commonwealth blue. Your donations go straight toward helping us register, contact, and turn out voters from now until Election Day. So Derek, if you can, please rush a donation to DPVA right now to help us stop Glenn Youngkin and his Republican allies from buying the election this November! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team DPVA = =** | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Doubling donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Some supporters can’t donate - can you help fill the gap? | | |
---
Hello, The pandemic has hit families hard. It’s one of the reasons I really hate to ask for money. That’s why recently, my team asked some folks in this community why they hadn’t donated to our campaign yet. If someone is struggling to get by, I want to make sure they’re prioritizing putting food on the table. 188 people told us that they’d like to donate to our campaign but they just can’t swing it right now. That’s why I’m coming to you. While I don’t need you to make up 188 donations, I’m hoping that you can give now so that grassroots supporters who have fallen on hard times don’t have to worry about it. **[Will you please donate $5 before Thursday’s mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32348625/295487977/1018596853?refcode=e20210713_mwh-match&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODc1M2Q3OS0yYWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKeZ7eyYkROpLnUrBY07xn9-qIdshgSqv4Yro-Gaelo=)** I'll say it again: I hate to ask you for money, especially since you’ve already been so generous. But my race was the closest one of 2016, and Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority. There is simply too much at stake for me not to ask. **[Please -- anything you can give helps and could make all of the difference in protecting New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat and our fragile Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32348626/295487981/1018596853?refcode=e20210713_mwh-match&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODc1M2Q3OS0yYWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKeZ7eyYkROpLnUrBY07xn9-qIdshgSqv4Yro-Gaelo=)** Thank you. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

subject: the summer slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
During the summer months, it tends to be harder to raise the resources we need to keep our campaign running at full steam ahead. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32348809/295488448/211588299?refcode=EM_FR_210713FR_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E1Yzc4ZC0yYmU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeDcAp0PFK95JR53MMS5fXXmvD--Xy3lzj_Su16rjw4=)

| Peter, you may have heard that we’re in the “summer slump” of campaign season, but if not, here’s what that means for us.

During the summer months, it tends to be harder to raise the resources we need to keep our campaign running at full steam ahead. People are out spending money on other things, and the country is reopening after a year of being socially distanced.

But this month is important for us -- we just finished off another very strong quarter, and we can’t slow down. **This is especially crucial because we know that Mitch McConnell and his megadonor special interest friends are backing Ron Johnson heading into 2022.**

The Republicans will stop at nothing to hold onto this seat, and they’ll do everything they can to take back the majority in the Senate and stall all progress in our country.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5 or whatever you can today. It’s too important for us to lose momentum right now as this race -- and the weather -- are heating clean_body: During the summer months, it tends to be harder to raise the resources we need to keep our campaign running at full steam ahead. | | = | Peter, you may have heard that we’re in the “summer slump” of campaign season, but if not, here’s what that means for us. During the summer months, it tends to be harder to raise the resources we need to keep our campaign running at full steam ahead. People are out spending money on other things, and the country is reopening after a year of being socially distanced. But this month is important for us -- we just finished off another very strong quarter, and we can’t slow down. This is especially crucial because we know that Mitch McConnell and his megadonor special interest friends are backing Ron Johnson heading into 2022. body:
Democrats in Texas’ state legislature were forced to flee the state to protect Texans' right to vote.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32349397/295490627/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4N2IxYzExLTJlZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sgr1KY1q5wdUpft6zSAxDLa-M5pgnXAZ_V0U3Vm8HZE=)

Friends -
Just yesterday, Democrats in Texas' state legislature were forced to flee the state to protect Texans' right to vote.
As a Texan, this isn't just news anymore. This is personal.
I was born and raised in the piney woods of Tyler by a single mother who instilled in me the values of hard work and helping your neighbor. When I see laws like those Texas Republicans have continuously introduced to take away our right to vote, all I see are attacks on neighborhoods like the one I grew up in.
Republicans in the state have vowed to arrest the Democratic legislators as soon as they return, and will continue calling legislative sessions until they finally restrict our right to vote.
Those same Republicans weren't served any warrants when they fled Texas to escape a disaster caused by government failure - a real problem Texas Republicans **_still_** refuse to address.
These Republicans have made one thing clear: we can only count on them to make things harder.
Nuestro PAC supports Texas Democrats in their struggle to protect Texans' right to vote.
**[Can you pitch in whatever you can to help Nuestro PAC protect voting rights in Texas?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32349398/295490628/376838283?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4N2IxYzExLTJlZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sgr1KY1q5wdUpft6zSAxDLa-M5pgnXAZ_V0U3Vm8HZE=)**
There's a lot on the line and we need your help.
Thank you.
Chuck Rocha

Fellow American,

We're in the dog days of summer. America is back. If you've been to the airport recently, you've seen that people are on the move once again. It's a blessing that Americans are free to travel without restrictions. For Senate Republicans, that blessing is also a curse. This summer is critical to our success. We are projected to have some of our lowest fundraising yet, and we can't let that happen.

I know from my own email inbox that Democrats are pressing on with their fundraising, and we can’t let them start to build a competitive advantage. In 2020, Democrats raised more than $5.5 billion in their efforts to win the Senate majority, which they did by the skin of their teeth.

If we’re going to stand a chance of coming out on top next year, we can’t let the fundraising slow down for even one day – despite the summer travel season. So, I’m asking you this – **[will you help me make it as hard as possible for Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=02be2c88017f4e7baeb5062242b4a27e&_e=yNB14TPbyURM8ZeYnk14jvK6fLAA8oQ_NQUjq2IPB83qTmQu7dsOy3gPL8RQXHHRgxHRYFIBqigjIU3dFZdWqEliftlilYYAO-9RAOcS1QaPD1IpoP7tNT8tqFLAXN7eSHpJFvuy65mLjOSaB0etOskeh7CeRL-ZGXm00G9fHTYnoZdMmK6M3Ve_n8kNDZYtu9YaFDbRqH3GVKzC9V3jOD03Ak8muQ4ls0VX9crUH0PggrOyV-xkD5j1XjExFCgNlR-Ldp4zFZ4y5sJi7psHa8FU1dliBLiGCCQ3vKtfRLy_de9pkgJm2EXK5IIU3zKoDlE2Ns0WEwkWXn-2_iw8QfQXN_38Wre7geCpEwOYPU-NkSzPJE4b7fZAjDcVCh3VSDPyIjU2vwvuOOme7IpVFnsF_MSjdi3InzOKPqWvQJb0MrfGuePc_aqinLbj6pQ5t1DdQWPc6jfBdAlAupeBOGg8oUGJBKbEhJ2kvyoHugk%3D)**

We have to take it one day at a time, so today **[I’m looking for 1,500 conservatives to deposit just $5 into our Senate Majority Fund](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=02be2c88017f4e7baeb5062242b4a27e&_e=yNB14TPbyURM8ZeYnk14jvK6fLAA8oQ_NQUjq2IPB83qTmQu7dsOy3gPL8RQXHHRgxHRYFIBqigjIU3dFZdWqEliftlilYYAO-9RAOcS1QaPD1IpoP7tNT8tqFLAXN7eSHpJFvuy65mLjOSaB0etOskeh7CeRL-ZGXm00G9fHTYnoZdMmK6M3Ve_n8kNDZYtu9YaFDbRqH3GVKzC9V3jOD03Ak8muQ4ls0VX9crUH0PggrOyV-xkD5j1XjExFCgNlR-Ldp4zFZ4y5sJi7psHa4LemiTrkwa-RkuOiEjxKa5IovtS7jOD_RRd947EiH1DTYhnlDRL6tlex2CpiVYmxoBsxiS8sT15f_SbvPahHtQj8brF9-QNW5TJPyG08A_Bjcue-wGcnT10GR7TrarKmxUChXbSNKKL05B1NwWrSdBG_XfG6i6M_I8wxcbRviuO0gtrXdPOeVeyWWzrS0XyAp2SapKSQwdOY68sXfDwoeE%3D)**. It may not sound like much, but every day we’re bringing in money, the better positioned we will be to topple the far Left in 2022.

| [**DEPOSIT $5 INTO OUR SENATE MAJORITY FUND** **› › **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=02be2c88017f4e7baeb5062242b4a27e&_e=yNB14TPbyURM8ZeYnk14jvK6fLAA8oQ_NQUjq2IPB83qTmQu7dsOy3gPL8RQXHHRgxHRYFIBqigjIU3dFZdWqEliftlilYYAO-9RAOcS1QaPD1IpoP7tNT8tqFLAXN7eSHpJFvuy65mLjOSaB0etOskeh7CeRL-ZGXm00G9fHTYnoZdMmK6M3Ve_n8kNDZYtu9YaFDbRqH3GVKzC9V3jOD03Ak8muQ4ls0VX9crUH0PggrOyV-xkD5j1XjExFCgNlR-Ldp4zFZ4y5sJi7psHa5C0qEnfOxnm_LesDQkQZc3_RoHoQEMveOqitWnTTlGzHc9_gofCwTntHi1W3-SJvgRJgEaOl_u994KjAE0c4ORB8kUL2xLQQcRzvO9GaMeryNNLEkwrRE-VeT0k7YgyaycFUld1W8WW4iEW6hhOrxXxRGK9tEC2RTSKHsF3To59Kt6JPDd_-CjdhUlxteBDoZvXRs1qh68AjWxupx1rfxU%3D)

Last year we witnessed 8/10 most expensive Senate races on the record books. If that’s any indication of what’s to come in 2022, then we’re in for a ride; If you’re curious as to why my colleagues and I are reaching out to you in July 2021, that’s why. **[Raising the campaign cash we will need to defeat the far Left takes years to amass.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=02be2c88017f4e7baeb5062242b4a27e&_e=yNB14TPbyURM8ZeYnk14jvK6fLAA8oQ_NQUjq2IPB83qTmQu7dsOy3gPL8RQXHHRgxHRYFIBqigjIU3dFZdWqEliftlilYYAO-9RAOcS1QaPD1IpoP7tNT8tqFLAXN7eSHpJFvuy65mLjOSaB0etOskeh7CeRL-ZGXm00G9fHTYnoZdMmK6M3Ve_n8kNDZYtu9YaFDbRqH3GVKzC9V3jOD03Ak8muQ4ls0VX9crUH0PggrOyV-xkD5j1XjExFCgNlR-Ldp4zFZ4y5sJi7psHa_t-gUYULkr2WSzv7x7xpa_A5qE2N10v5q1HHzjKRXCEk7oPv0g2xl83GDrmemMQsnGwen0ZmajWkxKB76oTZqd5SGc3LoRLqUrFequjxMgm0HQ93RbY56f6r78j8zmvH86GNkLUqlN69SBuzJ7XeI1u891ZUVbv5t8b_6eep6zc04oCBS0sWgYlHnZH4N8Gf6ffpRZ0HrHPjkcn7nVxxJw%3D)**

So, in light of the deep, deep debt Democrats are putting the country into, **[would you please consider a $5 deposit into our Senate Majority Fund today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=02be2c88017f4e7baeb5062242b4a27e&_e=yNB14TPbyURM8ZeYnk14jvK6fLAA8oQ_NQUjq2IPB83qTmQu7dsOy3gPL8RQXHHRgxHRYFIBqigjIU3dFZdWqEliftlilYYAO-9RAOcS1QaPD1IpoP7tNT8tqFLAXN7eSHpJFvuy65mLjOSaB0etOskeh7CeRL-ZGXm00G9fHTYnoZdMmK6M3Ve_n8kNDZYtu9YaFDbRqH3GVKzC9V3jOD03Ak8muQ4ls0VX9crUH0PggrOyV-xkD5j1XjExFCgNlR-Ldp4zFZ4y5sJi7psHa9Qyz4OInTuFjw5Ev4rKuZI2dB8hO_h1wjF3YvN2rzVW-b9Ote9E0QQXNAAhMWaMREp8AXbLGFBiy3CyuNtVmHiPkWNCiaGl-A1gAhoVJhXNdcyGxMKRI1zBRuPMSB1EYmhxyCcoIAzl5jAHx7Y0nnda0qLvRyJ6csG5q0nV7pQQVtbpXNQcXm_lBQt8GgUK7oIECvpOPB7Zo96IfsKjkjY%3D)** We sincerely need all of the help we can get.

Respectfully,
Senator Josh Hawley

name: Virgil Peck
subject: Kansas’ Best Shot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
My name is Virgil Peck. I've served 13 years in the Kansas Legislature, currently as the senator from our state’s 15th district - the home county..... Friend, My name is Virgil Peck. I've served 13 years in the Kansas Legislature, currently as the senator from our state’s 15th district - the home county of Derek Schmidt, and the district Derek represented for 10 years while in the Kansas Senate. I’m writing to you today to share my full and complete endorsement of Derek to be our next Governor. I’ve known Derek for over 20 years, and am confident he’s the right choice to lead our state. One issue that I’m very concerned about is the crisis at our southern border. Thousands of unlawful border crossings are taking place every single day, and the Biden administration continues to refuse to call this crisis what it is. When they finally did send Kamala Harris to the border, she visited a section that was 800 miles away from the main crisis. It’s clear that we can no longer trust the federal government to secure the border, end the immigration crisis, and keep us safe. That’s one reason why I’m turning to Derek Schmidt. As governor, Derek Schmidt will serve as our last line of defense in keeping liberal policies out of Kansas – He’ll fight illegal immigration by supporting the rule of law. clean_body: My name is Virgil Peck. I've served 13 years in the Kansas Legislature, currently as the senator from our state’s 15th district - the home county..... Friend, My name is Virgil Peck. I've served 13 years in the Kansas Legislature, currently as the senator from our state’s 15th district - the home county of Derek Schmidt, and the district Derek represented for 10 years while in the Kansas Senate. I’m writing to you today to share my full and complete endorsement of Derek to be our next Governor. I’ve known Derek for over 20 years, and am confident he’s the right choice to lead our state. One issue that I’m very concerned about is the crisis at our southern border. Thousands of unlawful border crossings are taking place every single day, and the Biden administration continues to refuse to call this crisis what it is. When they finally did send Kamala Harris to the border, she visited a section that was 800 miles away from the main crisis. It’s clear that we can no longer trust the federal government to secure the border, end the immigration crisis, and keep us safe. That’s one reason why I’m turning to Derek Schmidt. As governor, Derek Schmidt will serve as our last line of defense in keeping liberal policies out of Kansas – He’ll fight illegal immigration by supporting the rule of law. Derek Schmidt has aggressively prosecuted illegal immigrants who have committed terrible crimes right here in Kansas. He is absolutely dedicated to keeping current and future Kansans safe. Derek Schmidt right now is in court defending President Trump's immigration policies - because the Biden administration won't. He even went to the U.S. Supreme Court to personally defend our state's authority to enforce our identity theft laws against illegal immigrants and others who lie in order to get jobs - and, most importantly, he won! Derek Schmidt is the right leader, and the one I trust to put pressure on the federal government to enforce the immigration laws of the United States. –Virgil Peck Kansas State Senator, 15th District | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Political Prosecution of the Right
body:
This is a tale of two cities: Portland, Oregon and Washington, D.C.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/b763hSV8E763VnEQn7qwujXX4w/1GGsL64ZuUebjH763nMCJqQA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/b763hSV8E763VnEQn7qwujXX4w/1GGsL64ZuUebjH763nMCJqQA) This is a tale of two cities: Portland, Oregon and Washington, D.C.

The 2020 Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in Portland caused $2.3 million in damages to federal buildings where rioters and ANTIFA domestic terrorists threw firebombs at buildings.

According to Federal prosecutors, the January 6th protests in Washington, D.C. caused $1.5 million in damages to the Capitol (a few windows must be very expensive).

We're now up to 563 people who have been charged with various federal crimes for their participation in the January 6th protests. There will be hundreds more to come as the Biden administration, DOJ, and FBI are ramping up efforts to surveil and prosecute Trump supporters across America who were in Washington DC on January 6th.

Many of these people have been rotting in jail cells for the past six months and denied their due process.

In Portland, 96 rioters were charged with Federal crimes under the Trump administration - but since Biden took over, nearly all of the charges have been dropped.

This is blatant abuse by the Department of Justice and nothing less than political prosecution (and non-prosecution).

**Congress needs to step up and hold Attorney General Merrick Garland accountable for politicizing the DOJ, FBI and ATF.**

[**Help me get to Congress to make that happen by donating here.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/b763hSV8E763VnEQn7qwujXX4w/1GGsL64ZuUebjH763nMCJqQA)

The Biden Administration, backed by Nancy Pelosi and the entirety of the Deep State are using the events of January 6th to identify and lock up anyone they deem as "extreme" or "anti-government." They are trying to make Trump supporters political prisoners in America, and we need members of Congress who will stand up to this abuse of power.

**The BLM rioters who are openly anti-law enforcement are all-but-ignored by the Biden administration. Even worse, BLM 's actions have been encouraged by the Democrat party and its leadership.**

Congress needs an overhaul to recognize its obligations to justice, law and order, and protecting the Constitutional freedoms of the American people.

**I intend to make that happen.** Please help my campaign win in the upcoming primary [**with your generous donation here**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/b763hSV8E763VnEQn7qwujXX4w/1GGsL64ZuUebjH763nMCJqQA).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: then and now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTC6OazTbubOm-xD8ib2V1YE-NIebuuF7i634sO0Re0UI7SUjZnENcC3F726w2uajwFcAa51CgW66mAgcv87tF_e3LUbCX_rIrv6C2QsPIdE7qVN1WPAArhkofdKpX2TucRrJIrIpkWX-ykN16ndbwBi3ROyK63LHeEsoRVMPW3f5UO-nF7DInOsYQo7-0tRYZCEeRAv2ciEpRSacv1ZqgpjE%3D)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I’m a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I’m a proud Californian.

But I can’t stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I’m announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTC8NnKiDLHKEWI8GGeD2PTMwGF23U82HLlpTYdze6_lagIuMWDc0aNzM7gLmRbkkRAmROUXYblx5NLft5Vby__AJIrWrByMkYCV-_J4WbeRXnKxdl6_IfGBUiQ-o7ZVfaMHvi7AgKaRx2YdPh6pXV4jUZJWMutcPEH063XeXr-8thhBIwc6HxiiK3yg8KCZcfh_lKb8kaDnR2sZSi4nESi08%3D)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today’s California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country’s and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats’ full control of our state before it’s too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTC8CuKNn0sRELs9cw14LG1SgxaniMP1nLITeK-b4oooi44B-tVv_-vvoLVd2AgOUB1Suyv_EobDNkq3-D4kugc0nzZEPio97Y34SsW9f3hbgTc4HhPPk0_542yKD3vlMX5PVy_e7vfwmQ2ItDQXKwzPNqGdJ42mJ9EFIvapxvWS1pttU5NFJNN1CHIASlQ-kwl1D0I96c92VmCyFpNYpA5rE%3D)

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTC2H8flkPniXxOZW8Kt6idgor6WMb5Y004ifSOSGkGbOlloSTcnI2DLDBzKGDo4GBtK4xcT_xVuEPx2iu4TDOnVINaxPxu2qEwuWXb9c9lvfuMQtvRrBYERNk5RjzLsSg0EBnG0H4g5n6KqcherSf7vgBh7uO9rjGlVyw9YEFn-y2iLx6Zy-KbuUCHrwqzXKL7ZYdI8H-Y6oeZ30gIkdMYlA%3D)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn’t frequent weren’t allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn’t come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I’m going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTC27iTXMe6jl_gxjTsMmmKOjuVf6DkLBVNHmel-7THljY124V0YawRenhCuPCcf9FbWYI7Du2iqtRZzATsBZHIZe4j6w3h26oKEsLAd_EJar0KVANTDGTY-MtVJI7Z6VLoXgk96k5renZ2-srrGeJ_MKRnuiTrCmc2td57y0cs6eEVaxTG1dalK8KIsl2gded9kYL4D42_a9Ru-kYW7nhgK0%3D)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I’m willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTC4t62ItJZ44YOka_wLsjUUgUZQCQjyKjQfMUDMuvweLfejQyDGrqlR_WbwSS43KLqg34q7noHG3bMN9usBlkgK_mi_NnzZ7pvzIwyuweP2iaRdCWimTmEevaMOa9SeKHRKCf9g04dtz8-Iao5mAy3vWhvq49uzJmGTe39pY_uGkRqmlVVeOopJUAkZVSH9puTeYenrd63C7fksr0eAEmGLk%3D)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=854cc1f268f446a7b4ad920315c81a93&_e=hP7TS4bBHePzfh4nk2yp8KN-2E0ngNeHpMm9_KzZkvthbyhp1hZr2qVL6Uj9oCoqGDQfDjH9d_6ntbZzkNCiVAciuEbsCa7OwOTQ6Q9sAjz1ovjYXqfLxSbqgNIQRVBHwIu4drCqeagFJTE29yLTCwjnfNzVyEVAIiEzUKsuSCUatePU31x1PAq5nmAF7Rhw6Ly_FjcsAUI0e4GRs9IDpVmS8_kB5DtLqhwcJs_7wAvQJr6_1ujMwi17NXwuVr70fxaa9VUwTT1JJbUGUax-mO3gNgCTcj5xLSrkJ915fPSwKRGg_q_uNlrQC1STV3QB8G0wGS3zKYKkJRZmsk0qN77XWognwFMQwYSFr95Fnc8%3D)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

Fellow American,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e1074e9724c7416e9d5991a9452adf47&_e=Pwxs1RvTZOojXABqgB6OCx9sRsq1WiEv7wf5V8ZxphhhPZlNlwfSDGmrb-ShNqLdpfAncI-HMyGKw7W7aCq9qJlbtbHs5X-Emp4bV4Bmc5Y77j_x-whUnVRKQtSp-hEVzABJCPVNSre1MIygjEYEwU_jZ6pPLwjAKGUafhdw0ze1f0Ny0QsCudvU0VERnzh8eFmsVJt9jcawguGm5CI41nX80PfV3KUgPfW9hzKHNPBpJTEHhbFaL8R2NKxXM5frBMqjhQe28o4e4uE-hf_fwfgO-TlIMAQHiuzifUcRoe6rOGHN7066LV1oHke-oYA1DzAGZwUNslOn6GcVrj3Sfkd2Lg8mnY628EdwEGL13BBaqHHsUNKhUfPUUgEWBna-O_ilQG2ld0rcqMVNpJbVjzQzHL9YqbIckGzB0-fH1hxlXyhEFHYvbuQB826lmFOcrw-a1sH1ueP1qzA3adoMpMSUXFhDg91AX7j73QZ1WmYHaKLZggJCtajEDBZ1VyEelx2zpTjF5NPoiWaJFcCZCg%3D%3D)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Fellow American, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e1074e9724c7416e9d5991a9452adf47&_e=Pwxs1RvTZOojXABqgB6OCx9sRsq1WiEv7wf5V8ZxphhhPZlNlwfSDGmrb-ShNqLdpfAncI-HMyGKw7W7aCq9qJlbtbHs5X-Emp4bV4Bmc5Y77j_x-whUnVRKQtSp-hEVzABJCPVNSre1MIygjEYEwU_jZ6pPLwjAKGUafhdw0ze1f0Ny0QsCudvU0VERnzh8eFmsVJt9jcawguGm5CI41nX80PfV3KUgPfW9hzKHNPBpJTEHhbFaL8R2NKxXM5frBMqjhQe28o4e4uE-hf_fwfgO-TlIMAQHiuzifUcRoe7OYEvThw4wNyls-zEgxItgzYrQ301uG35VkBEEf1fiGIITccAJvPJZ6o3r42cEZ4YOWbLXXDPOlvzx40qO3cM29dGRUJ0v2IxEaHafebbWLIPDG4jV0y_OIluheU9O_jTWRF-33yPQadq7EP8ot40AtiQiA0n7zHruKkCnL4IBFxObQGdTTr9_QlEork4TXTkEaMIv6edgJw01IX15AprnSNoEDsbcBVQ13JjkKlowvw%3D%3D)** _

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ _e pluribus unum_ ” – out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Fellow American, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. clean_body: Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. Agree or disagree? . Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist. How absurd. Fellow American, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students. Please take a moment to let us know: | POLL REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: Tuesday, July 13th Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal? The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ e pluribus unum ” – out of many, one. This is what the Left does, Fellow American, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America. . Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

| | It's been well over six months since the January 6 insurrection, but Donald Trump is still touring the country and spouting his seditionist rhetoric. And now, those same supporters he spurred to action are renewing their calls for violence. So, Peter, we have to ask: **Do you think Trump's continued dangerous rhetoric will spark another violent insurrection like the one on January 6?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32350427/295493163/-833579544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZTBiZTQyLTMyZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nlWl9-skketIytTIGsq3k8iPGyIz5FnaE0WOdt1HMBw=&emci=c5e1fbca-f1e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75e0be42-32e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32350429/295493168/-833579544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZTBiZTQyLTMyZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nlWl9-skketIytTIGsq3k8iPGyIz5FnaE0WOdt1HMBw=&emci=c5e1fbca-f1e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75e0be42-32e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

Thank you for your response. For our democracy to truly recover from that dark day in January, we must call out Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP's anti-American rhetoric before it rears its ugly head once again.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

**[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32350431/295493170/-833579544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZTBiZTQyLTMyZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nlWl9-skketIytTIGsq3k8iPGyIz5FnaE0WOdt1HMBw=&emci=c5e1fbca-f1e3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75e0be42-32e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: My priorities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This week is the beginning of a very busy work period as the Senate plans to move forward on the bipartisan infrastructure package and a budget proposal that will be the vehicle to pass our progressive priorities.
#
Peter,
This week is the beginning of a very busy work period as the Senate plans to move forward on the bipartisan infrastructure package and a budget proposal that will be the vehicle to pass our progressive priorities.
There are still a lot of discussions and negotiations ahead before we get a final product, but I wanted to share with you some of the priorities I’ll be fighting for these next few weeks to ensure families, workers, and communities have the help they need to build back stronger and fairer.
**[Can I count on your support? Add your name to the petition right now if you’re with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32350736/295493854/805569844?ms=pm_em_210713_1&refcode=pm_em_210713_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA3ZDI1My0zM2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysyx3Imsdad693hFQ4OPBcXHr7H0RTFl0eI0j_eN2VU=&emci=89a338d6-09e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=be07d253-33e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Upgrading Washington state’s infrastructure is an important priority for me: repairing our bridges and roads, securing major investments in affordable housing and public transit, and making universal broadband a reality -- and the bipartisan infrastructure package is a big opportunity to make that happen. Like so many of you, as I’ve driven across the state I’ve been frustrated by how our state’s aging and crumbling infrastructure have made traffic and congestion worse. But we can’t stop there -- we also need to invest in clean energy and more resilient infrastructure that will help us address the climate crisis happening here and now. That’s why I’m speaking out on the need to make a landmark investment in climate action to curb emissions and advance climate justice.
We’ve also got to focus on the human side of our economy -- meaning child care, paid leave, free community college and more. I’ve heard from families in Washington state about these challenges for a long time, and the pandemic made clear just how much we need action.
There’s a lot of work ahead to build back stronger and fairer from COVID-19, but I know that with your support we can keep making the progress our state and country needs.
**[Sign your name now to support these progressive priorities in the upcoming legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32350738/295493860/805569844?ms=pm_em_210713_1&refcode=pm_em_210713_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA3ZDI1My0zM2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysyx3Imsdad693hFQ4OPBcXHr7H0RTFl0eI0j_eN2VU=&emci=89a338d6-09e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=be07d253-33e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32350739/295493861/805569844?ms=pm_em_210713_1&refcode=pm_em_210713_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA3ZDI1My0zM2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysyx3Imsdad693hFQ4OPBcXHr7H0RTFl0eI0j_eN2VU=&emci=89a338d6-09e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=be07d253-33e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

body:
| | | **TRUMP ON 2O24 RUN: "PEOPLE ARE GOING TO BE VERY HAPPY"** **** **[This is the most important ask we have ever made of you. Trump just appeared on Fox News and all but confirmed he's seeking a second term. He's already hinged his campaign on the defeat of our Democratic House Majority, and his donors have rushed him and his Republicans $85 MILLION to put their plans into action. That's why we need a historic response to protect our Democrats and make Trump's return BACKFIRE. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-k0j-J_)** ****
We need you to make a crucial choice at this moment.

\-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, defeat our Majority, and barge back into power...

**\-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump and his Republicans they will NEVER take the House from us.**

Trump has hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.

And here at Democratic HQ, we will fight with everything we have to defend it from his and the GOP's grasp.

But we can't do it alone -- not when his mega donors and extremist right-wing base have armed him and his Republicans with $85 MILLION to defeat us.
[**Can we count on your $3 to protect our House Majority?**](https://links.e.dccc.) **** | | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: 2024 Republican Presidential Primary
body:
| | | | Would you vote for President Trump, or Governor Ron DeSantis?

---
Dear Peter,
