body:
Trump supporters started a physical confrontation at a town hall for families. Will you stand with us in support to show far right Republicans the strength of our movement behind Katie? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32352549/295512980/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYzBkMTQ1LTNkZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G__NWeRqA-pSulNDZWn0m4zVnfGPDlHrVOYxNSnHvtk=&emci=2fb46c2a-31e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c3c0d145-3de4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, As Republicans try to regain control of Congress, Katie's congressional seat is expected to be a major target and hotly contested in 2022. While it is no surprise that the GOP added this congressional district to their list as one of their main targets, far right opponents of Congresswoman Porter created unsafe conditions at a planned family-friendly event this past weekend. After Jan. 6, it's hard to feel safe in Washington and now it's hard to feel safe in Irvine, California. Violence is never OK and it is never part of a Democratic civil discourse. **[Will you stand with us in support to show the GOP the strength of our movement behind Katie? Now would be a great time to chip in so that Katie's campaign could get extra security at her next town hall.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32352550/295512981/1834377524?refcode=0713&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYzBkMTQ1LTNkZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G__NWeRqA-pSulNDZWn0m4zVnfGPDlHrVOYxNSnHvtk=)** When the fight broke out, Katie rushed to the crowd to protect senior citizens. She selflessly protected her constituents while vowing to let them be heard. This is another reason why she is such a great Congresswoman and a**#badassmom**. **[Now would be a great time to chip in so that a single mother could use campaign funds for childcare and would not have to bring her children to a campaign event where they might be in harms way.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32352551/295512982/1834377524?refcode=0713&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYzBkMTQ1LTNkZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G__NWeRqA-pSulNDZWn0m4zVnfGPDlHrVOYxNSnHvtk=)** She stood up for her constituents and now we have to stand up for her. **[Help us continue this movement behind her by chipping in what you can today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32352552/295512983/1834377524?refcode=0713&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzYzBkMTQ1LTNkZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G__NWeRqA-pSulNDZWn0m4zVnfGPDlHrVOYxNSnHvtk=) **Every donation helps Katie spend less time on fundraising and more time on fighting for our Democracy. Thank you for all that you do! name: =?utf-8?Q?Christopher=20Ekstrom?=
subject: Big Tech is the Enemy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Trump is Fighting |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2ab4540d57&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

After years of conservatives complaining about the tyranny and censorship of Big Tech, President Trump is fighting back- and he needs allies! [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2823e31a1c&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING the radical Left- including Big Tech.

I'm so glad someone is finally doing something about these out of control Leftist Big Tech corporations. I'm not surprised at all that it's President Trump!

_"In effect, Big Tech has been illegally deputized as the censorship arm of the U.S. government," Trump wrote.

Trump said that his lawsuit argues that "Big Tech companies are being used to impose illegal and unconstitutional government censorship," which he claims is occurring due to Democrats in Congress being able to "coerce platforms into censoring their political opponents."

The former president said that Congress has pressured Big Tech CEOs to censor false stories and disinformation, which they do using "an army of partisan fact-checkers loyal to the Democrat Party."_

What the Tech cartel is doing is insane. [It will be stopped](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=417aa35dc5&e=ba6e67b849). But what I'm seeing is too little support in Congress to rein in Big Tech and its collusion- even among Republicans!
---
|
---
| _House Republicans have been flamboyantly waving the anti-Big-Tech banner with increasing passion and aggression, often in response to growing online censorship. Virtually every television appearance or in-district rally by a House Republican entails righteous denunciations of Silicon Valley monopoly power. Yet none of the Committee Republicans was willing to sign onto or support the Cicilline report.

In sum, there was a huge gap between GOP rhetoric about the evils of Big Tech and the actions of House Republicans, which not only failed to follow through on their fiery language but oftentimes seemed devoted to protecting the interests of the very Silicon Valley giants they were publicly denouncing. _

I'm tired of Republicans who say one thing and do another. _Trump is fighting Big Tech, and we need Republicans in Congress willing to help him!_

The RINOs love to tell us what we want to hear at Election time- only to break our hearts the next year. This Big Tech issue is a great example of this.

We will support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump's efforts to rein in Big Tech! clean_body: Trump is Fighting | | | | | Hi Peter, After years of conservatives complaining about the tyranny and censorship of Big Tech, President Trump is fighting back- and he needs allies! My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING the radical Left- including Big Tech. I'm so glad someone is finally doing something about these out of control Leftist Big Tech corporations. I'm not surprised at all that it's President Trump! "In effect, Big Tech has been illegally deputized as the censorship arm of the U.S. government," Trump wrote. Trump said that his lawsuit argues that "Big Tech companies are being used to impose illegal and unconstitutional government censorship," which he claims is occurring due to Democrats in Congress being able to "coerce platforms into censoring their political opponents." The former president said that Congress has pressured Big Tech CEOs to censor false stories and disinformation, which they do using "an army of partisan fact-checkers loyal to the Democrat Party." What the Tech cartel is doing is insane. . But what I'm seeing is too little support in Congress to rein in Big Tech and its collusion- even among Republicans! | | House Republicans have been flamboyantly waving the anti-Big-Tech banner with increasing passion and aggression, often in response to growing online censorship. Virtually every television appearance or in-district rally by a House Republican entails righteous denunciations of Silicon Valley monopoly power. Yet none of the Committee Republicans was willing to sign onto or support the Cicilline report. In sum, there was a huge gap between GOP rhetoric about the evils of Big Tech and the actions of House Republicans, which not only failed to follow through on their fiery language but oftentimes seemed devoted to protecting the interests of the very Silicon Valley giants they were publicly denouncing. I'm tired of Republicans who say one thing and do another. Trump is fighting Big Tech, and we need Republicans in Congress willing to help him! The RINOs love to tell us what we want to hear at Election time- only to break our hearts the next year. This Big Tech issue is a great example of this. We will support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump's efforts to rein in Big Tech! The Swamp hates conservatives. They like their closed door, elite mentality. | Thank you! name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: What questions do you have about AOC’s new committee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AOC will be in charge of tackling generational disparities and increasing worker power in the economy.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210713-2274-header&t=1&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj)
**Alexandria was recently appointed to the new Select Committee on Economic Disparity & Fairness in Growth which aims to address wealth inequality in our nation — and we want to take a moment to explain what that means:**
AOC will be in charge of tackling generational disparities and increasing worker power in the economy. And her priorities will be revisiting some of the basic assumptions about the U.S. economy — including inflation and the management of inflation by the Federal Reserve, and reducing unemployment — ensuring every American has a dignified job.
The last time a committee like this was created was during the Roosevelt administration. And having someone like Alexandria — joined by colleagues like Pramila Jayapal — on a committee whose main function is to promote economic fairness and growth means we have a real opportunity to tackle our long-standing issues of economic inequity head on.
In her work on this committee, Alexandria wants to make sure she’s prioritizing the needs and voices of this community. [So what questions or concerns do you have that you’d like to see addressed by the Select Committee on Economic Disparity & Fairness in Growth?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/concerns-economic-fairness-growth/?refcode=em20210713-2274-P&source=em20210713-2274&t=2&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj)
**[What would you like addressed?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/concerns-economic-fairness-growth/?refcode=em20210713-2274-P&source=em20210713-2274&t=3&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj)**
As we recover from COVID-19 pandemic and economic crisis, Alexandria is going to use her position on this new committee to lift up working people — now and into the future.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210713-2274-P&t=4&refcode2=2274_2526796_z9khUj&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2274%2E2526796%2Ez9khUj)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Fellow American,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b53b019b55b3466f90981ac685f08b86&_e=R6OJE-AYttodyLmEQ_jJX1LfbQM55T1Z1xlGMUG2eWwveUiBHXaR5O47tXiKiwJKhTJHKtWPgb4RDFaQUc_sHrOgpPeiDn9cNXa1BuD6yDjHRu5E4zdb0hRwwWEetNt-7lkGOyLjku4Fz2sz4XchXSB2bCpe8DhkvSn_6jlRL-pllUzKpwloaCugLzGtyZm3AP-Q3m3GVkBKfCuwSrXcgQ6gAb2WYXJw-MhDhQSGcvo-XuI7lRQirl5cyOX9wCD0qabj3KlBaQoVh0DBPCGRE2kI15zP0CLjp9zG4I2tVV9AeN7Ig99STx82U1smauuM0HFk0m-S_mHPppQSWjbZ9Cz8Lb6uDPdl70XFGFYN3YP8Rr7T4dgvSWeIfsewvsINyn4DeCL565kNtTjfTh-7QoFBJbc_OVIIAED3XlG_M94PsLjv9NgPRHAiizZIMdpOgGhBqt4_zeS4kDfQXxvTBw7M_MVCFgT8ix5O0ED2sLxlCp1_-ixlE1SGKPYt1OlC)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Fellow American, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b53b019b55b3466f90981ac685f08b86&_e=R6OJE-AYttodyLmEQ_jJX1LfbQM55T1Z1xlGMUG2eWwveUiBHXaR5O47tXiKiwJKhTJHKtWPgb4RDFaQUc_sHrOgpPeiDn9cNXa1BuD6yDjHRu5E4zdb0hRwwWEetNt-7lkGOyLjku4Fz2sz4XchXSB2bCpe8DhkvSn_6jlRL-pllUzKpwloaCugLzGtyZm3AP-Q3m3GVkBKfCuwSrXcgQ6gAb2WYXJw-MhDhQSGcvo-XuI7lRQirl5cyOX9wCD0qabj3KlBaQoVh0DBPCGRE2kI15zP0CLjp9zG4I2tVV8VzfRaBK5s6xQMxsE87101x96p77PRoeyK92wCu_PqFgYkFDawqIBlAqEiBL5w_MBz3a_vvcgGaFWfq0shQcsrgvTFoOl7RJ4yqUzHHqPTdRiGLSRvlX9X_r4RniGgT6x9lbs9HRKn7GDHJNEew1JhAQ_uZWYQwizTIg8_UWxiQ8cBfq9auSdtC4Tt3ds7mCWnzhAiH5H_gij6ZhY_IIXB)** _

POLL REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: Tuesday, July 13th

[** TAKE OUR POLL BEFORE MIDNIGHT->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b53b019b55b3466f90981ac685f08b86&_e=R6OJE-AYttodyLmEQ_jJX1LfbQM55T1Z1xlGMUG2eWwveUiBHXaR5O47tXiKiwJKhTJHKtWPgb4RDFaQUc_sHrOgpPeiDn9cNXa1BuD6yDjHRu5E4zdb0hRwwWEetNt-7lkGOyLjku4Fz2sz4XchXSB2bCpe8DhkvSn_6jlRL-pllUzKpwloaCugLzGtyZm3AP-Q3m3GVkBKfCuwSrXcgQ6gAb2WYXJw-MhDhQSGcvo-XuI7lRQirl5cyOX9wCD0qabj3KlBaQoVh0DBPCGRE2kI15zP0CLjp9zG4I2tVV8t3A8t1ehYPW5S1aoUPQWJhVFOObxCx_tnOB4nMxEBY6F3jhoLQcbrtez5AqIRsKJ9XLc40JqchSetoJbOk1mnQs-kDD-iZayBer-yUuFdxQcB1BFr-DFMiPLTHsEXN3JaAkgMZOhFYobVUjOKd0_G3bE9xD6UEuGE4hTNZm9dI7XVdZhtE7Xae-lvcU1ZlZ97mOKysIMQLWV2rpQz5lBY)

---

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ _e pluribus unum_ ” – out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Fellow American, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It’s so important that we stop the Democrats before they start indoctrinating our children with obscure ideas from the fringe Left](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b53b019b55b3466f90981ac685f08b86&_e=R6OJE-AYttodyLmEQ_jJX1LfbQM55T1Z1xlGMUG2eWwveUiBHXaR5O47tXiKiwJKhTJHKtWPgb4RDFaQUc_sHrOgpPeiDn9cNXa1BuD6yDjHRu5E4zdb0hRwwWEetNt-7lkGOyLjku4Fz2sz4XchXSB2bCpe8DhkvSn_6jlRL-pllUzKpwloaCugLzGtyZm3AP-Q3m3GVkBKfCuwSrXcgQ6gAb2WYXJw-MhDhQSGcvo-XuI7lRQirl5cyOX9wCD0qabj3KlBaQoVh0DBPCGRE2kI15zP0CLjp9zG4I2tVV_89966IR_xn1COBw8WgUBimmkhpz74cex3Hh7KNuUKfwDk_uYxekjrHW-BJMxCYeEbhIspSaE-ime8Cw8DmG4y6dXgFqQDle9Fcu67y52qo-SjOnK0JzG1F7zCTQ9HzWpO14rt1tyLFr5ul87xzbJQvkxTEqRVuzac3qz_phu6LP4L9FjhR2F7g1bKAN1luh71H4vqyEc7VuE7v1hwCGHq)**.

Thank you,
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b53b019b55b3466f90981ac685f08b86&_e=R6OJE-AYttodyLmEQ_jJX1LfbQM55T1Z1xlGMUG2eWwveUiBHXaR5O47tXiKiwJKhTJHKtWPgb4RDFaQUc_sHrOgpPeiDn9cNXa1BuD6yDjHRu5E4zdb0hRwwWEetNt-7lkGOyLjku4Fz2sz4XchXSB2bCpe8DhkvSn_6jlRL-pllUzKpwloaCugLzGtyZm3AP-Q3m3GVkBKfCuwSrXcgQ6gAb2WYXJw-MhDhQSGcvo-XuI7lRQirl5cyOX9wCD0qabj3KlBaQoVh0DBPCGRE2kI15zP0CLjp9zG4I2tVV826XZdkhJ8RbJK3O-C6IAkEjbY44_2lRXNhJN-EPXXa2389wAyzJ7Qr3dQ_AghbOVQjRX4aYq7rAt_0uZ2GG25nQsKh5_pxo0d-9QSNlwWpCG91WNDhuNDgH14t0RQ1n33CGyP58acC3w4kY_UopRD_IYwaltpDC8Hak7p1F2yd0RHWZLZ5N43sq57HA3wf6fN-4owWnBngtF-lOLxfvwT)

If Republicans flip the House in the next election we could face a serious threat to voting rights. Will you chip in today to help us protect our House DFL Majority and our right to vote? name: Team Fetterman
subject: We ranked #1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Last week, CNN dropped a BIG article about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210713-1981-header&t=1&akid=1981%2E434096%2EQ0IqvZ)
Peter — check this out:
Early last week, CNN dropped a BIG article about the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
_Guess which state was ranked #1?_
**Pennsylvania. 😱** Take a look for yourself:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210713-1981&t=2&akid=1981%2E434096%2EQ0IqvZ)
Believe it or not, Peter, this isn't the first time we've been ranked first in this list. Seriously. There's _already_ consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022.
**That’s why it's absolutely mission-critical that we raise as much money as possible early on to show that John Fetterman is the candidate that can win not just the primary — but also a tough and expensive general election against the PA GOP.**
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, will you make your very first $5 donation right now to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate? This isn't your average Senate race, Peter, and if you make a contribution to our campaign you'll become a critical part of our grassroots team._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210713-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1981%2E434096%2EQ0IqvZ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210713-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1981%2E434096%2EQ0IqvZ)**
This is really big news for our strong, honest, and inclusive campaign to lift up all of PA's 67 counties. Let's seize this momentum and win this thing, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Winning the #1 most likely to flip seat in America is going to take a LOT of support. [** _Click here to donate directly to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate. Any amount you give today will have an immediate impact on the campaign work we can fund _this month.__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21733?refcode=em20210713-1981&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1981%2E434096%2EQ0IqvZ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210713-1981-footer&t=24&refcode2=1981_434096_Q0IqvZ&akid=1981%2E434096%2EQ0IqvZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGHBDik35TYYEEM0LZhwpUsSg3RXhOLrPWHUb5VSLvTAnHX-jJr4AxBMCPWznHQa5TLzGXV3oaFPhIUZCNiUM1ozn7okAG1ArvAJ2IiVupTYvvR_hiUCExwlvpUlqE3DFnBEZWJmR4xiqKEiSyuVdUsXOu4IghadCbV4vdLW6CZ9kuyR_Ga4zFC4IrSVVfPH-nDcOHLv4sxqdTiUOcYgkw8M%3D)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I’m a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I’m a proud Californian.

But I can’t stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I’m announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGPkqMVFtp9Ihdzb9lQJxy02TCqUxXgasg3lXXrCrREdzuz6hfZhn2b34mu2xXpmERCtskQdwoUYNWTtUFuCW-ukMkNZ9F-nvOwrNOimh4vzBU243n9a73qVm_QUSw4o2aAuBdzTRsoDskHFXSgTjKyQnrPcBhOwzHk7mCokT4adAiKSsWPegvNdcSWsy5JmohX8Sda1AVeIOAOkotBarNAQ%3D)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today’s California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country’s and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats’ full control of our state before it’s too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGDmdkwNDsDbZ8kxLRCVZmpr9dPaw-Q8pVyPwZyZlOoNG6Miw8Qw6QMr_b_VXl1tH1WHH24zlVeaAvTptVc4SjUD2xqiTYBAVnKbrEAepjGyksuCcFbufNTuiOnukfyGoIDDvw74qAkkgaws9XIsKvBcJXAUhU2cat0aIUJMT_JQs1c8tBzOGFM5mX2jD2-wxX4ut39co2v7FjvWtueio5is%3D)

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGDXRuBWo0vUEt4k5xfVEtcRj21p4eX2_u_j0no7SIVI4Yw7AtoJzkAf7zB-SPgJ2GUiOeoRm8KwsJ4AjW0x5R6kXVSKN7zMgnBzGgIwzdbxevUvUohWa2r6ywV74aBXW-LLEhbvhcysrxMF5VLT7lfaT7hxq35_G3Mt0-9suE41-aLx48aZ-e7wW3wxIIa4M12D4s9Quv6ZkU_OsCVtKLd8%3D)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn’t frequent weren’t allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn’t come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I’m going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGN6wGLgedYhd4dnvAbzDNd6bS5C-PUDxC1aT-SOPzHppSsS1xEsdA4GuZc2IkRNKUTKo-ZINxBmtG4TUjL7ww-FishmXgSvCsqOqg8qt0t5GmVUMeuCyyApkMRTelhQ2F8B4o-zdfQEmsf6nVu-8zdoYuy8jsJQkHBeZlbPKGTUDG6YBVK5LGBZX3JnGiK8U0DIvsb1bCjlLxkcTFsfEKow%3D)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I’m willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGJrtAV3h-mvmffkjJ9SnQU5oAIC8qYWXTM9ATfQWpfd39Rv3NtDBaQPtYzA9pyfCimqzq6InTKSfDDb3HNNr-SgS4dDqv8xmrcOHv092-fqhe0CpLGwKH9RCqmbNYBDzgEI9tWkg3s_bQ-Ecx0RYEgTj_lO8PsLEl-my3BkNa7oV3Gd3__7-o0mCChPNT9qJ1Ecg2NCQg19cqApKaPdE33A%3D)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_e=47EcfCTv_OQ6CAILvI2HkSveBNDELujCxyKRFyA8VYr52wf9iTrP6UrVESzy8k4ATaS1wCI8g1MhLKpBHnCbonZhHWJBG3lCm-9k-gqw1sNSU6pzmz--Yxuwl1n078zEFl13x8uX6Dx7OcseRZ9KGNoKLaWY8C5rOyX0Hd2JCik4-deQEJUx3hgxZ_C5KyiYEDxrV3eumDXjWd4couGoTYpHFIDtVp6tjVMPCQagdTGLMFN2mk_K_tkTfIUXwbpyHetJ1MVIrhOHyVh9PpgpZ4a8Aqvz1Kjp8GBK7dxLq5hbkaMxJB4HXGBzK6vPRrr2AK0Av1zCfpPGYNh5p_oDVm491tmRtYOZGNORczlyJ-I%3D)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=ee9b7667175c45bdada992bf43248794&_t=eDiOR12SsCr10jOcFS9pFuZbL5Ek-eWAnNdu-rSAK88-y6C2g8-FdG7xMEdmLZTdCSql3D-7v7h05Jb64NQbVxjikE5i31jpPcQ7sMJGvfSsaBl5ah2frS60P_hWATqBat0g1Lcsn2_oaoYup8bpVOuqj3df2MeipkXFfpbb064%3D).

Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Terry said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN just released an article titled **The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: If you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FmtlkvxHIWK_xByxaCTiWTCMfM8cUtw6gLRe8oMgGGfMCPqv8oaHT3nBEtyFDw0swavpxKs2GjUS_krufDHKuWAtTb8DL9fBydx03LsBBl893etM69nxIloOqH55iov7q4tlhmS8II2rV-mVIIvjGj5dvXrtJ5HJmBC_kxqWmlrzNs3PG1KLSoRl6djOMLrVsQP8tfyUdUGAmSw5ZyabA3IZj2Spi9qPqbAvjt1HObFUHFNsR1r9Gq5UaY36s7Up1w/3dk/VuhCv38FTzO1HCELm5xQOg/h1/OrX1dIJt7Kj3AsEKV8jDZs7L11ppiSO9su_n5h6MH3E) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly

| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FmtlkvxHIWK_xByxaCTiWTAFL12CH_AIHY-M2WPiz6Hufn5YSijEwRQL6k3_NFstXe3boPCcafVQuGW49N0dvZkeIjXWvlVzLo_0ju4qAFRGCJGfwDZLy_hwpgjw23vw6Y5Cnjw2w7vXED0rZx6PwSn4ffRJroQKMihGiXu_SWLzyacim0ez5Hy2i_iffTcKQjeJjiaHN2CHnL1oRKkn_eyUetGIx6veeVvKhfTuH69mbey7hqnh1tBHDJ2Z1nr9mA/3dk/VuhCv38FTzO1HCELm5xQOg/h2/mkZgpsm-rBJYE-UlrNaYoGM5_RsNAV5ZJ__hVLiqmNY)

name: Yvette Herrell
subject: Stopping the socialist takeover
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YVETTE4CONGRESS
body:
I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election. I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who took a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c4cac518d5854dd48a3c98e87d6d98b1&_e=WJBsUSvu_-ovM9fbSFfavVsMKNwiKG5mYmfSiuSWA3ADcpWxe3Kk8eHpDmY7-hDYUW9NAt8Fa0Iv-awhGXdHkuTRpOafMCn5_4X3rTgTYq2KQ3nx7xND1J4Ikg-wkviguvjjeeMyYRjfP54pauuYraZ03TzJ4fKrNZpb6o2YC0-CMWuKFjwWSM7FdZ0zFuriOr61FJHjMrhTt4DxuXMZtTim_v3555Rx09YAEw39Pke47goYM57_L7xS1XcYVfKIe0c7hI5KVK1zYZTNVJo6Hh_JhaQ56DbUcoHEKr-pui_bP6-YGayQDrteXnTzCqjLOoQnf2VshxR1z3PsBtmTA1vlZSLjaIQaVNSaJE1UfX3qoYKmSKw7yYSnBnt_fe0wSFSCxgkHVMKbS6AYPO4is08Eo4g0d-uTsa7y8FX6LFH-FMCKwAsbljGmpDLPXgr0yEaRf_B2I9r_5JGxn_s4Qg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

My name is Yvette Herrell. I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election.

The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America – and they will try to unseat any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way. **And since I took this seat from the Democrats in the last election...**

**I am one of the Democrats’ TOP TARGETS in 2022.**
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c4cac518d5854dd48a3c98e87d6d98b1&_e=WJBsUSvu_-ovM9fbSFfavVsMKNwiKG5mYmfSiuSWA3ADcpWxe3Kk8eHpDmY7-hDYUW9NAt8Fa0Iv-awhGXdHkuTRpOafMCn5_4X3rTgTYq2KQ3nx7xND1J4Ikg-wkviguvjjeeMyYRjfP54pauuYraZ03TzJ4fKrNZpb6o2YC0-CMWuKFjwWSM7FdZ0zFuriOr61FJHjMrhTt4DxuXMZtTim_v3555Rx09YAEw39PkfByWFjg5XZi9QYH86kvennudDkL86IBookakv7jHuXBInTsepgKDofqYXnM7SgyVz8OJpxZwemlMqXCdeCx3T5XuBmjsRqum2HvMfcOSHnqvkKwU2aETmsdl718R8StjblYdLPRo7msm0Tu-qEfuC51gCbbaV7asuRkYhghLOOeIQLfoPOiffExSoUX2mUkLUyq3BZhwz4llgL0rDiXrNJyd3KivoGitZxtUI4rfjB8Q%3D%3D)
I’m working nonstop to fight for President Trump’s America First policies in Washington, partnering with strong conservatives to save his legacy and stop the radical Left by winning back the House.

body:
---

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, JULY 13, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA CELEBRATES STRONG CONSERVATIVE WIN IN HD34 SPECIAL ELECTION AFTER MONTHS-LONG VOTER MOBILIZATION CAMPAIGN
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia congratulates Representative-elect Devan Seabaugh (R) on his resounding victory in the State House District 34 special election tonight. This hard-fought win comes after a [months-long push](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mflAUHgkvwCVc0txKcXAkn1EUSU5lcGtT0tegz3bvzUHedp9JNtgTFRfe7kp_xmBO9jYUczd7BxjD0QIHnL3xilIL7NF1OR4d01jS3C4G-n0tHkuSSvTJNSv-kcq45ZR6PawhCz3NJps0PDllexIg98O_Jib_FYr0DB_asJAx102P8O1ZRdu09tkYJUXE2HB9XEfkjhwmuha0wpdyn9VSd0ZZqlmP_Pv7UC1eVHY8bCq3fFEd8Nxc_YWLMFrZxG5ZTsQv7MOqh6ndfTEELVhikMbBx-1Ejo-CkoJxUnpr-idWNjvitE9Vg==&c=Rn1NaF6ISg92gJxG-Bz0VD2heoQnjE_km8Nxk0xR8ryGxlbE34M95w==&ch=Il5-z8fgCTznJRO4-lu72bV2FOprdUu4wHm9A7Grke7vD1ulJgqNVQ==) by Greater Georgia to secure a conservative win through grassroots outreach and engagement. subject: IMPORTANT ELECTION AUDIT UPDATE

body:
News breaking constantly now |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6eee8e82ad&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
**_IMPORTANT ELECTION AUDIT UPDATE_**
Did you see me on Victory News, Kenneth Copeland’s faith-based news program?

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative for the State of Arizona and the leading Conservative candidate to take over Corrupt Secretary of State Hobbs job in Arizona in 2022!

**I have been a pioneer and leader in the vast grassroots movement that is election integrity. In fact, I have been called the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.**

Right now, the water is on the stove and it is simmering, and millions of patriots around the country are just waiting for it to boil.

_Yes, I am talking about the results of America’s Audit in Maricopa County, Arizona._

**In fact, this is why I was invited on to Kenneth Copeland’s faith based news network. To talk about the election integrity movements spreading like wildfire around the country. **

** _And why me? Because since I first put my boots on the ground and got the Maricopa County Audit running, I have been recognized as the chief authority on the Election Integrity movement around the nation._**

And this is why I am writing to you today...

_To give you an inside look as to what to expect to unfold in the coming months, all you have to do is keep reading below._

And what I need you to understand is this: Right now we are at a **critical** moment in the history of this country. Not only with the election audit, but with the countless elections around the country to install secretary of state’s that will serve the people, not the corrupt swamp – and will defend the integrity of our elections!

**And if we do not win this VERY important race in 2022, our elections will be left at the mercy of the Democrats, and if there is anything that I learned from 2020 – the Democrats will stop at literally nothing to win.**

[This is why I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79efe623c3&e=44b8c466b0). Every dollar raised today will go to getting the message of election integrity out around the country so that we can win the election for Secretary of State and save our elections!

[_Please donate as much as you can to fight against the Radical Left who are stealing our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=58c15e6fa5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=27b7dd1bc4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***SPREAD THE AUDIT***
As we speak, we have boots on the ground pushing to spread the Election Audit around the country.

**I already have travel planned to Washington in October, where we are pressing for a public hearing on election integrity.**

_We are also pressing in crucial swing state Pennsylvania to bring the truth to light!_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=51e959a92f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And if there’s one thing I know about Senator Mastriano, he will be like a pit bull on a porkchop with the election audit.

_We WILL get to the bottom of this._
---
|
---
| Can you see it? Do you see what is happening?

**The Election Integrity mission is spreading around the country like wildfire.**

**_[Will you join us on our mission?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b23001e188&e=44b8c466b0)_**

_[Donate $100, $250, $500 or more today to protect American Democracy and support my campaign!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0800c53387&e=44b8c466b0)_
***JOIN THE MISSION***
**I am going to bottom-line this for you.**

**_We are finishing the most thorough election audit in history. Double-checking, Triple-checking... as many times as it takes to prove without a doubt what we knew all along. The 2020 election was stolen._**

We know that enemies will emerge out of the woodwork when the results are tabulated and released.

They already are. I and countless Election Integrity patriots like myself have been attacked, ridiculed, and challenged in every way imaginable.

**Imagine the onslaught when we catch them red-handed.**

[And this is why I need your support today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4ecd920912&e=44b8c466b0) We are in an all-out brawl with those who would have us believe that America is evil, and that elections are meant to be stolen. [Without your support, we simply can’t win.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a775f563fc&e=44b8c466b0)

**And at the end of the day, I have a few very strong convictions I want to share with you before I say goodbye until next time:**
* **If the Democrats were so darn sure that this election was the “safest and most secure ever,” then they would embrace the opportunity to assist in the audit, not challenge it at every turn.**
* **Any institution that receives public funding, schools, the police, even banks, are routinely audited by regulators – with the exception of elections. What makes elections different?**

Here’s the deal folks, this tells me without a shadow of a doubt that Corrupt Katie Hobbs and her Democrat cronies got something to hide and something up their sleeve.

**And we better be prepared. We know the Democrats wills top at nothing.**

And when that time comes, will you be in our corner?

_[Donate TODAY to join the movement and support my campaign!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=792eee6c01&e=44b8c466b0)_
_***JOIN THE MOVEMENT***_

God Bless You,

And this is why I am writing to you today... To give you an inside look as to what to expect to unfold in the coming months, all you have to do is keep reading below. And what I need you to understand is this: Right now we are at a critical moment in the history of this country. Not only with the election audit, but with the countless elections around the country to install secretary of state’s that will serve the people, not the corrupt swamp – and will defend the integrity of our elections! And if we do not win this VERY important race in 2022, our elections will be left at the mercy of the Democrats, and if there is anything that I learned from 2020 – the Democrats will stop at literally nothing to win. . Every dollar raised today will go to getting the message of election integrity out around the country so that we can win the election for Secretary of State and save our elections! | | | *SPREAD THE AUDIT As we speak, we have boots on the ground pushing to spread the Election Audit around the country. I already have travel planned to Washington in October, where we are pressing for a public hearing on election integrity. We are also pressing in crucial swing state Pennsylvania to bring the truth to light! | | And if there’s one thing I know about Senator Mastriano, he will be like a pit bull on a porkchop with the election audit. We WILL get to the bottom of this. | | Can you see it? Do you see what is happening? The Election Integrity mission is spreading around the country like wildfire. JOIN THE MISSION I am going to bottom-line this for you. We are finishing the most thorough election audit in history. Double-checking, Triple-checking... as many times as it takes to prove without a doubt what we knew all along. The 2020 election was stolen. We know that enemies will emerge out of the woodwork when the results are tabulated and released. They already are. I and countless Election Integrity patriots like myself have been attacked, ridiculed, and challenged in every way imaginable. Imagine the onslaught when we catch them red-handed. We are in an all-out brawl with those who would have us believe that America is evil, and that elections are meant to be stolen. And at the end of the day, I have a few very strong convictions I want to share with you before I say goodbye until next time: If the Democrats were so darn sure that this election was the “safest and most secure ever,” then they would embrace the opportunity to assist in the audit, not challenge it at every turn. Any institution that receives public funding, schools, the police, even banks, are routinely audited by regulators – with the exception of elections. What makes elections different? Here’s the deal folks, this tells me without a shadow of a doubt that Corrupt Katie Hobbs and her Democrat cronies got something to hide and something up their sleeve. And we better be prepared. We know the Democrats wills top at nothing. And when that time comes, will you be in our corner? JOIN THE MOVEMENT | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8b010c27bbf647709a142926e828e45a&_e=arDpvaa8tDU7d81y_Uiunc2_J8xnAruDr6Mfhn0UQTq5sRMumqrxmQ6-BbztybdeQ1JJA0TOp-unagJSpriPH8zxq-L2FNW96sWHQVaBBvcr5nSKeJN9CBgGtE7bHsLpxFYCV69zTzrqvo8izD0liWo7ex9KlRyMUkd1GmrE3n_qil1g374OK3PMXz-1ZtWQVSER8H7M1VMrVJHHvFmT9P0p4p7GzhfMNFKhXSWPHLWiOt83R90GJTUL0iEhPMPPuMGoa7aNa3lcpBDJZWewm7xRVXZOgn2oCnUXIxJW-hzi9lUdjmGUtK_CIa6T4S-yRfYJRx9U_ZBApjmAiGqnteRuLM4rvXx3BU21EbJ-6gk%3D)

---
Fellow conservative,

My name is Larry Elder and I’m a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I’m a proud Californian.

But I can’t stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I’m announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8b010c27bbf647709a142926e828e45a&_e=arDpvaa8tDU7d81y_Uiunc2_J8xnAruDr6Mfhn0UQTq5sRMumqrxmQ6-BbztybdeQ1JJA0TOp-unagJSpriPH8zxq-L2FNW96sWHQVaBBvcr5nSKeJN9CBgGtE7bHsLpxFYCV69zTzrqvo8izD0liSQZVQwgyIJTc1urk0DzFqGaeZlUfbcELsuLqi7HKuXr2qwFprxsbDab90-ufrxZGy8FaKZeUhdFNcrwPnz7WQET4gcxWOOCZagazJ_3FrkIO1GUnQsE68luIscFsqpYOHQB--rKC-4nIpOVYe0O9k2oNwMW9tDuv3aI8ptjhPgzo2uzA5eUaTwrX2NPH45F1uz3i00uyF1pphJpl7mQJUo%3D)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today’s California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country’s and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats’ full control of our state before it’s too late, fellow conservative. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8b010c27bbf647709a142926e828e45a&_e=arDpvaa8tDU7d81y_Uiunc2_J8xnAruDr6Mfhn0UQTq5sRMumqrxmQ6-BbztybdeQ1JJA0TOp-unagJSpriPH8zxq-L2FNW96sWHQVaBBvcr5nSKeJN9CBgGtE7bHsLpxFYCV69zTzrqvo8izD0liUuP77ulzwI0i5CiE0eFEqxmfLdeCIYLwNKYdU2aTZWEjIO14tq055xd1Rq2h0HtQQLD-ReTyP4NRD7fSlUV6lHSWq7CixCRkvr7FaH9XQo26rMY-NiIHKrJKquDgE8UtXgqkm1Ls69mMFFuM8hnD1QfRKCTBbtuX_thTqdG9FLsgmI0dWxpZjIXmX6mSdndPPkMdNTQQm9pXimEqrqNjg0%3D)

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn’t frequent weren’t allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

clean_body: I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. | Fellow conservative, My name is Larry Elder and I’m a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I’m a proud Californian. But I can’t stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - which is why I’m announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election! My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles. At that time, this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it. Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly impossible to achieve. Today’s California is a sad state of affairs. Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country’s and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government. Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far! During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! Meanwhile businesses he didn’t frequent weren’t allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction. I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn’t come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom. Fellow conservative, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I’m going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, Thank you, Larry Elder | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Peter,

We're in the dog days of summer. America is back. If you've been to the airport recently, you've seen that people are on the move once again. It's a blessing that Americans are free to travel without restrictions. For Senate Republicans, that blessing is also a curse. This summer is critical to our success. We are projected to have some of our lowest fundraising yet, and we can't let that happen.

I know from my own email inbox that Democrats are pressing on with their fundraising, and we can’t let them start to build a competitive advantage. In 2020, Democrats raised more than $5.5 billion in their efforts to win the Senate majority, which they did by the skin of their teeth.

If we’re going to stand a chance of coming out on top next year, we can’t let the fundraising slow down for even one day – despite the summer travel season. So, I’m asking you this – **[will you help me make it as hard as possible for Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=23d1639f6e194632b5262689dbf6bd3c&_e=LQOD8nG-YxVuwMRe3qJ3fMnJgCgtZNuiV_XE8oNSQCEwQZKv5jpYcLH0p0nOH8KciREoa2LuoW8HbtBzeAOt13KBfYmp3h9T85OnGyVsYLfgzo4ZUs9QZwcATVkvTpO6hdnO8yOp-DTid9GK3GSN1YEIV06N4U1RiJjfI5ElxuUWKxZwIZFlPhpoRBhELHBlV7kKYe9rcQ0AHZtajw_uGFzHj_bnhBUBzi9-fgaRSDX48HAdXyn3qcWLTYAFE_ukf4sdshxshNhdNmfHhdYhYHdC5eedxUVtfolpMm9bUqXWUp4t2RDhopMxTf6VX6PPrc4qLlbmE9VVCAfxNOJs4jLzZYE_KgGrtSh_2K--sCvLrKzG01onfRSPIWgG51vTfmaalT-Xh5svbQn7qkDui9pnwez2cAjEkL4SY5KNNleTu3-__R8gkeIJNPaAbj8K8RGLEhMVBpX0dJrfqa3QiFYeYovFUoEFaaNUbN8KAc2AlPu7Jovm4_LV_wwUQyt2)**

Respectfully,
Senator Josh Hawley

So, in light of the deep, deep debt Democrats are putting the country into, We sincerely need all of the help we can get. Respectfully, Senator Josh Hawley If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: re: The results of our summer survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I wanted to thank everyone who responded to our summer survey. I’m incredibly grateful that so many supporters took precious time out of their day to share their priorities with me and the rest of the team.
As I expected, everyone had a lot to say! But the overall message is clear:**We can’t wait any longer for bold and transformative change.**
I am doing everything in my power to ensure that Congress puts working people first, starting with an infrastructure, jobs, and families plan that meets the scale of the crises we face. _But I need to know you’re with me in this fight._[**Can you chip in $3 today to power our people-first movement forward? My team tells me that we need 250 contributions by 11:59pm on Thursday to keep our fundraising momentum on track.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210713?refcode=em20210713-459&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=459_420207_GAIXnx&akid=459%2E420207%2EGAIXnx)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210713?refcode=em20210713-459&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=459_420207_GAIXnx&akid=459%2E420207%2EGAIXnx)**
I learned a lot more about _what_ you want Congress to prioritize in the coming weeks and months! I love diving into the numbers, so here are a few that stood out to me:
* A whopping**98% of survey respondents are fired up about ending the filibuster.** It's clear that if we have any hope of delivering the bold and meaningful reforms that our communities need, the filibuster must GO.

* **Not far behind, 92% of respondents said they are ready to raise the minimum wage to at least $15/hour. $7.25/hour is NOT a living wage and I won’t stop fighting until we get every worker the raise they deserve.**

* And in third, **89% of respondents want bold action on climate.** From record heat and wildfires in the West to heavy rain and flooding in the Midwest and East just in the last month, we’re running out of time to fight climate change. That’s why I’m pushing on Congressional leadership to prioritize climate in the infrastructure bill.

These results remind me why I got into this fight, Peter. And I won’t slow down until our policies answer the needs of working families — not the wealthy and well-connected. [**Chip in $3 or more today toward our mid-month goal of 250 contributions to support our movement for real change.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210713?refcode=em20210713-459&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=459_420207_GAIXnx&akid=459%2E420207%2EGAIXnx)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210713-459-footer&t=23&refcode2=459_420207_GAIXnx&akid=459%2E420207%2EGAIXnx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=459%2E420207%2EGAIXnx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=459%2E420207%2EGAIXnx)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to the California Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021 FPPC ID# 1439386
body:
I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsONWmiReYVW4RouzG8a4fC5pUjynPySbtAu5pTtl8-8jUrlB0PqgiDGaMrJvxeOxghoaVR0fu4SDX3H7YCqkm17DyJEZUecDCTTYjqkD2fmv2NloqX7X2RWmPHdT6txVF7dUGmSOK6kK3C-6OrWAyAVS0aFeDgbozCPpKGAcEbGUNbVUhOHeQJNo6LlUpl4NJdnY8KEC9JicC61uwlQPkIk%3D)

---
Fellow conservative,

My name is Larry Elder and I’m a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I’m a proud Californian.

But I can’t stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I’m announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsNVCEnbzjo1ScCOtGvoSggWcXcYUqr0M5KRgcDEpzKOH29cRz1m9hOi2rUtejxc6HdfwMXfb5j3APyXbia4XVJ2wtuI0kLKcJZkotty-7LBJSC20VQH11kGE9h3K8DnnTYslpav3oCDhAZTLyA-YO1x1JluQO6UQheAGOMYzJEwPJhOU_RD1FAVksbuqRn9LrTKQKznw-AlGz7aldGQ0yTA%3D)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today’s California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country’s and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats’ full control of our state before it’s too late, fellow conservative. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsOVg4_71Ts4KQdyld2YR1c-CEe6h1w7u-Ycx2QHER9Fni4EXXwFK63uific6qLo1gMAUAMIDGquMyduACU9pfb3UsDkqqATzmTzf4lyBjdkaJKTZoiUccvW7XPPgGfRa0fkEaVGEk3Ate-YA3BrJhdszy0ov_4SP-FWVL8n1aYYciyd59T97fkau1LTwCrp-GW0Uxpwebiix0_0dzSVuK_8%3D)

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsPuebNCvlJgowecVqZ0jn9JeI04OpT-P-3jNAV2zjYkK1WhLneEjbolIH9tx9MW-6JU4FBPe0Blp2s842hzyegkakd3JMzy8XpMg5YVOVqvSVCo3JbilS-T2S-6mRLCOh7WX-H8EHjurKGvFX17MkslW90yW_hczZBeb0aNP0vL7Q5aHS3TmKv-JKPMEAMiuR0iuvqBMqVzMi6oxDl5XzmI%3D)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn’t frequent weren’t allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I’m absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom’s failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn’t come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Fellow conservative, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I’m going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsOeBKFHbHC2yY3sXbGVh9B8AgLUzehmrrwEIobc2jJ9XXWCTAgxoaS9uy00bo7Wb3OWUGoVig6lWdbxWy5joJVSYpED2UD08JsRVHh_trotCbGwz33MPm_DhinEu5-mBD841t8Bfic9djVhk0n7t4Dyh5iSAdKdKv5SBYj5sXC5d6wrwLcTj9SOR_04tGwZHkrl-WHVyAr0ejV_1oWl7Xmo%3D)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I’m willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsMwuByZKZYGyK0vdN8q9Yqjo6jELV0mLHVXiKQFG14b7iyS8DF89_DvmL2o4lJFvdK9r2dEN1lYPX8ABkWwJYX7KIAQmFOMPHthjV-vOcEMf3pCktQHHRkhN6IsWr9NIdVNRTZWYNPCgOa6HcJsWblf2JCTCcgDggiZCICBipc3ivENGTVg_3LWUEI7Ng-fl-3vCdnQEpaF5h3HWeeSYQto%3D)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** ****HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8f26a85e00a243ef9386c3cf4fb52792&_e=YUEumo7KeN8zU9wkD_rpVDikSLArqAFdMxyF4CAihghOjDNvrGG5lLe9PUo59DcWLBsiDps4WOKj03znW5_m5hxFqFeEWyueC7-NU4T6NvXMD7HsJnBAslesjyfN_YwFEVLePc-jzAWim3gJ1RSbsO9Yl_aBgUhuWbEeReh_JiLxyGrq0JmR3urLZoXPcRyVefG8GKSTo_U3itHyC-ZF-TRas6s0-jVfwheqtz2HqdbLNPfTtyM5u3nzPZ-PF8-2SW8_ewrE4HVgwvN36u8t5NF0a65lJyEQsdWFw3VzUuRgxYZ15Ox4Z4oK5R2TLzssjyX-nToik92PJn4DMChqzfkIESAbxRFk02tc7hSa22o%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: Stand For What's Right
body:
Just last week I announced my 2022 campaign for State House because I love this state, & I can't sit back and watch it fail due to weak representative | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/stand-for-whats-right-7-13-2021?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=cbdd44ff04&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Hi friends,

Last week I announced my 2022 campaign for State House because I love this state, and I couldn't sit back and watch it fail due to weak representatives.

However, I never expected just a week later that dozens of legislators, including mine, would fly away from Texas in a private jet to D.C. to block the election integrity reforms that were moments away from passing in the recent Special Legislative Session.
---
|
---
_How heroic of these brave Democrat State Reps to drink beer, fly maskless on a private jet, and vacation in Washington, D.C. to block voter ID requirements!_
| As Texans, standing up to a fight is part of who we are.

But, instead, they turned their backs on us, hopped on a private jet, and ran from this fight.

It’s time for a new generation of servant leaders to represent the very best of Texas and assume the mantle of leadership, and that's why I'm running for State House.

I can't do it alone though - could you help by [contributing $20.22, $100, or even $250 today?](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a9b0c30b27&e=4f010155df)

Together, we can stand up for what’s right, defend our great state, and ensure our values empower the next generation!

For Texas,
Will Douglas
---
| | [DONATE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=8c7444f188&e=4f010155df "DONATE")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: A Public School Fix
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
School choice. Break the unions. |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8b24968850&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

For too long, the teacher's unions have been dictating to parents how their kids should be taught.

The result? Large numbers of kids not performing at grade level. Arrogant teacher's unions trying to justify teaching racist Critical Race Theory as young as kindergarten.

I am an educator- a substitute teacher in Polk County. I see the issues and I know how to fix this mess.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fe24706561&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who takes money hand over fist from the corrupt teacher's unions that are trying to push CRT on our kids.**

It didn't used to be this way. Our schools didn't used to be this nonfunctional.

When teacher's unions were beholden to the Left and empowered with dictatorial control over education, everything went awry.

Faced with massive public outcry about the teaching of racism in the form of race essentialism, the teacher's unions are...defending teaching racism?

_In prepared remarks obtained by The Associated Press, American Federation of Teachers president Randi Weingarten said her union is preparing litigation and has a legal defense fund “ready to go.”

In an interview, Weingarten said the union is adding $2.5 million to an existing legal defense fund in anticipation of local fights over the teaching of race. The funding will be used to defend teachers who are disciplined for teaching about slavery and racism, Weingarten said. The union is also considering filing lawsuits to get clarification about new state laws limiting how racism can be discussed in schools, she said.

The nation’s other major teachers union, the National Education Association, recently issued its own call for an honest teaching of the nation’s racial histories. At the union’s national meeting last week, president Becky Pringle urged teachers to prepare students for a society that “has wrestled with the sins of its past” and learned from them.

“If this grand experiment in democracy is to succeed, if the inhabitants of our nation are to prosper, we must continuously do the work to challenge ourselves and others to dismantle the racist interconnected systems, and the economic injustices that have perpetuated systemic inequities,” Pringle said._

**That's right, the teacher's unions feel so emboldened by the Biden Administration that they are spending millions to fight the parents in the communities they are supposed to SERVE!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2b1f7f3db8&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**What we need is choice. The unions derive their power from monopoly. Let's take their monopoly away.**__

What we need is school choice. We need to give parents the ability to choose how to educate their children- home schooling, charter schools, public schools, parochial or religious schools.

**By giving parents choice over how to educate their kids, using their own tax money, we are putting the power in the hands of parents, instead of Communist extremists who masquerade as teachers. **

Biden gets everything wrong. He thinks sucking up to teachers unions and giving them dictatorial power will help education.

But we know better.

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda, including school choice. I will bring Florida's successes to Capitol Hill!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _He is terrified of me, and doesn't want to see me again! I can build off my success and win this right!

[This is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8d467ebd56&e=afa21b7626)_

The Dems must go! [Help me make schools teach again!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bd73ac6d1e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=43db1d9bf3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fd01e2e823&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1a08c10c0e&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._

---

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=77229736e0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=77229736e0).
